```{=html}
        const g = Math.round(a.g * (1 - f) + b.g * f);
        const bb = Math.round(a.b * (1 - f) + b.b * f);
        return `rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${bb})`;
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
        const head = 10;
        const ang = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(ang - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(ang - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(ang + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(ang + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 10);
        }
    }

    function render() {
        const qa = parseFloat(qaI.value) / 1000;
        const qb = parseFloat(qbI.value) / 1000;
        const dc = parseFloat(dcI.value) / 100;
        const rhoa = parseFloat(rhoaI.value);
        const rhorel = parseFloat(rhorelI.value);
        const rhob = rhoa * rhorel;
        const ma = rhoa * qa;
        const mb = rhob * qb;
        const qc = qa + qb;
        const mc = ma + mb;
        const ac = Math.PI * dc * dc / 4;
        const vc = qc / ac;
        const rhoc = mc / qc;
        const oilMassFraction = mb / Math.max(mc, 1e-6);
        const outColor = mixColor(oilMassFraction);

        document.getElementById('qa-71p-label').textContent = (qa * 1000).toFixed(0) + ' dm³/s';
        document.getElementById('qb-71p-label').textContent = (qb * 1000).toFixed(0) + ' dm³/s';
        document.getElementById('dc-71p-label').textContent = (dc * 100).toFixed(0) + ' cm';
        document.getElementById('rhoa-71p-label').textContent = rhoa.toFixed(0) + ' kg/m³';
        document.getElementById('rhorel-71p-label').textContent = rhorel.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('ac-71p').textContent = ac.toFixed(4) + ' m²';
        document.getElementById('vc-71p').textContent = vc.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('rhoc-71p').textContent = rhoc.toFixed(1) + ' kg/m³';
        document.getElementById('mc-71p').textContent = mc.toFixed(1) + ' kg/s';
        document.getElementById('ma-71p').textContent = ma.toFixed(1) + ' kg/s';
        document.getElementById('mb-71p').textContent = mb.toFixed(1) + ' kg/s';
        document.getElementById('qc-71p').textContent = qc.toFixed(3) + ' m³/s';
        document.getElementById('rhob-71p').textContent = rhob.toFixed(0) + ' kg/m³';
        document.getElementById('eq-71p').textContent = `${ma.toFixed(1)} + ${mb.toFixed(1)} = ${mc.toFixed(1)} kg/s`;
        document.getElementById('expl-71p').textContent = `Na spoju se najprije zbrajaju maseni tokovi: ṁ_A = ${ma.toFixed(1)} kg/s i ṁ_B = ${mb.toFixed(1)} kg/s daju ṁ_C = ${mc.toFixed(1)} kg/s. Budući da je ukupni volumenski tok Q_C = ${qc.toFixed(3)} m³/s kroz presjek A_C = ${ac.toFixed(4)} m², izlazna brzina mora biti ${vc.toFixed(2)} m/s, a gustoća homogenizirane mješavine ${rhoc.toFixed(1)} kg/m³.`;

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const tank = { x: 230, y: 80, w: 210, h: 180 };
        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.fillRect(tank.x, tank.y, tank.w, tank.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(tank.x, tank.y, tank.w, tank.h);

        ctx.fillStyle = outColor;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.15;
        ctx.fillRect(tank.x + 8, tank.y + 8, tank.w - 16, tank.h - 16);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
        ctx.fillRect(tank.x - 110, tank.y + 68, 110, 26);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fef3c7';
        ctx.fillRect(tank.x + 85, tank.y + tank.h, 26, 90);
        ctx.fillStyle = outColor;
        ctx.fillRect(tank.x + tank.w, tank.y + 78, 160, 28);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(tank.x - 110, tank.y + 68, 110, 26);
        ctx.strokeRect(tank.x + 85, tank.y + tank.h, 26, 90);
        ctx.strokeRect(tank.x + tank.w, tank.y + 78, 160, 28);

        waterParticles.forEach(p => {
            p.t += 0.01 * (qa / 0.15);
            if (p.t > 1) p.t = 0;
            const y = tank.y + 81;
            const x = tank.x - 110 + p.t * 110;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0ea5e9';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        oilParticles.forEach(p => {
            p.t += 0.01 * (qb / 0.03);
            if (p.t > 1) p.t = 0;
            const x = tank.x + 98;
            const y = tank.y + tank.h + 90 - p.t * 90;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ca8a04';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        outParticles.forEach(p => {
            p.t += 0.008 * Math.max(vc / 2.5, 0.3);
            if (p.t > 1) { p.t = 0; p.lane = Math.random(); }
            const x = tank.x + tank.w + p.t * 160;
            const y = tank.y + 82 + (p.lane - 0.5) * 16;
            ctx.fillStyle = outColor;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        for (let i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
            const ang = i / 26 * Math.PI * 2;
            const rad = 24 + 10 * Math.sin(Date.now() / 500 + i);
            const x = tank.x + tank.w / 2 + Math.cos(ang) * rad;
            const y = tank.y + tank.h / 2 + Math.sin(ang) * rad * 0.6;
            ctx.fillStyle = i % 2 === 0 ? '#38bdf8' : '#d97706';
            ctx.globalAlpha = 0.35;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
        }

        drawArrow(tank.x - 85, tank.y + 52, tank.x - 12, tank.y + 52, '#0284c7', 4, 'A');
        drawArrow(tank.x + 98, tank.y + tank.h + 70, tank.x + 98, tank.y + tank.h + 12, '#a16207', 4, 'B');
        drawArrow(tank.x + tank.w + 18, tank.y + 62, tank.x + tank.w + 98, tank.y + 62, outColor, 4, 'C');

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Komora miješanja', tank.x + 36, tank.y - 12);
        ctx.fillText('ρ_C', tank.x + tank.w + 172, tank.y + 96);

        const scaleX = 620;
        const scaleY = 300;
        const xBar = 620;
        const yBar = 90;
        const frac = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (rhoc - 600) / 450));
        ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.fillRect(xBar, yBar, 24, 180);
        const barGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(xBar, yBar + 180, xBar, yBar);
        barGrad.addColorStop(0, '#ca8a04');
        barGrad.addColorStop(1, '#0ea5e9');
        ctx.fillStyle = barGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(xBar, yBar + 180 - 180 * frac, 24, 180 * frac);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.strokeRect(xBar, yBar, 24, 180);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.fillText('600', xBar + 34, yBar + 178);
        ctx.fillText('1050', xBar + 34, yBar + 10);
    }

    [qaI, qbI, dcI, rhoaI, rhorelI].forEach(el => el.addEventListener('input', render));
    render();
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id='mixing-71-scene' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
  <style>
    #mixing-71-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-shell{border:1px solid #e4dff4;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdfd 0%,#fbfcff 100%);box-shadow:0 22px 56px rgba(41,76,109,.1)}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(124,58,237,.16),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#faf5ff 0%,#ffffff 58%,#eef8ff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7c3aed;margin-bottom:.35rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.35rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#1f3d5a}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#5c7286;font-size:.94rem;line-height:1.6}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #d8b4fe;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#faf5ff,#ffffff);color:#6d28d9;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #ddd6fe;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#faf5ff,#fffdfd);color:#6d28d9;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-stage{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.85rem;padding:.9rem;border-radius:22px;border:1px solid #e8e6f2;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#f9f7ff 58%,#eef7ff 100%)}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-stage canvas{display:block;flex:1 0 100%;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:18px}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.55rem;flex:1 1 760px;padding:0;border:none;background:transparent;box-shadow:none}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-overlay div{display:grid;gap:.25rem;min-width:0;padding:.78rem .86rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(231,225,247,.98);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#3b556c}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7a8697}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-overlay span{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:800;color:#123a63}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-state{position:static;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;align-self:start;padding:.72rem .92rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #ddd6fe;background:rgba(250,245,255,.96);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:800;color:#6d28d9}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-card{border:1px solid #e6ebf2;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #ddd6fe;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#faf5ff;color:#6d28d9;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#7c3aed}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fdfcff 0%,#f4f8ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.08)}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#6a849a}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-bars,#mixing-71-scene .m71-formula,#mixing-71-scene .m71-explainer{padding:1rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-bars strong.section,#mixing-71-scene .m71-formula strong.section,#mixing-71-scene .m71-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7a8697}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.75rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-flow-a{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,#0ea5e9)}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-flow-b{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fbbf24,#d97706)}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-flow-c{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8b5cf6,#6d28d9)}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
    #mixing-71-scene .m71-explainer{grid-column:1 / -1;border-color:#ddd6fe;background:#faf5ff;color:#6d28d9;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
    @media (max-width:980px){
      #mixing-71-scene .m71-head,#mixing-71-scene .m71-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      #mixing-71-scene .m71-chip{justify-self:start}
      #mixing-71-scene .m71-overlay{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}
      #mixing-71-scene .m71-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
    @media (max-width:640px){
      #mixing-71-scene .m71-overlay,#mixing-71-scene .m71-presets,#mixing-71-scene .m71-metrics{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
  </style>
  <div class='m71-shell'>
    <div class='m71-head'>
      <div>
        <div class='m71-kicker'>Zadatak 71 · miješanje</div>
        <h3 class='m71-title'>Na spoju se najprije zbrajaju maseni tokovi, a tek iz te bilance nastaju gustoća i brzina izlazne mješavine</h3>
        <p class='m71-sub'>Ulaz A i ulaz B mogu imati različite gustoće. Zato se na čvoru ne zbrajaju samo volumeni, nego i maseni tokovi: <strong>m<sub>A</sub> + m<sub>B</sub> = m<sub>C</sub></strong>. Tek nakon toga dobivaš gustoću homogenizirane mješavine <strong>rho<sub>C</sub></strong> i izlaznu brzinu <strong>v<sub>C</sub></strong>.</p>
      </div>
      <div class='m71-chip'>m<sub>A</sub> + m<sub>B</sub> = m<sub>C</sub></div>
    </div>

    <div class='m71-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> plavi tok A i jantarni tok B ulaze u komoru miješanja. U komori se njihovi maseni tokovi zbrajaju, a boja izlaza pokazuje kako sastav mješavine ovisi o udjelu ulja. Desno vidiš dvije odvojene bilance: volumensku, koja daje <strong>Q_C</strong>, i masenu, koja daje <strong>rho_C</strong>.</div>

    <div class='m71-grid'>
      <div class='m71-stage'>
        <canvas id='m71-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
        <div class='m71-overlay'>
          <div><strong>Q_C</strong><span id='m71-ov-qc'>0.180 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>m_C</strong><span id='m71-ov-mc'>174.0 kg/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>rho_C</strong><span id='m71-ov-rhoc'>966.7 kg/m^3</span></div>
          <div><strong>v_C</strong><span id='m71-ov-vc'>2.55 m/s</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class='m71-state'>Bilanca mase određuje izlaz</div>
      </div>

      <div class='m71-side'>
        <div class='m71-card m71-controls'>
          <div class='m71-presets'>
            <button type='button' class='m71-preset' id='m71-preset-default'>Početni</button>
            <button type='button' class='m71-preset' id='m71-preset-oil'>Više ulja</button>
            <button type='button' class='m71-preset' id='m71-preset-wide'>Širi izlaz</button>
          </div>

          <div class='m71-row'><label for='m71-qa'><span>Volumenski protok A</span><span id='m71-qa-label'>150 dm^3/s</span></label><input id='m71-qa' type='range' min='50' max='300' step='5' value='150'></div>
          <div class='m71-row'><label for='m71-qb'><span>Volumenski protok B</span><span id='m71-qb-label'>30 dm^3/s</span></label><input id='m71-qb' type='range' min='10' max='90' step='2' value='30'></div>
          <div class='m71-row'><label for='m71-dc'><span>Promjer izlaza D_C</span><span id='m71-dc-label'>30 cm</span></label><input id='m71-dc' type='range' min='15' max='50' step='1' value='30'></div>
          <div class='m71-row'><label for='m71-rhoa'><span>Gustoća vode rho_A</span><span id='m71-rhoa-label'>1000 kg/m^3</span></label><input id='m71-rhoa' type='range' min='950' max='1050' step='5' value='1000'></div>
          <div class='m71-row'><label for='m71-rhorel'><span>Relativna gustoća ulja</span><span id='m71-rhorel-label'>0.80</span></label><input id='m71-rhorel' type='range' min='0.6' max='0.95' step='0.01' value='0.8'></div>
        </div>

        <div class='m71-card m71-metrics'>
          <div class='m71-metric'><small>rho_B</small><strong id='m71-rhob'>800.0 kg/m^3</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-metric'><small>A_C</small><strong id='m71-ac'>0.0707 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-metric'><small>Q_C</small><strong id='m71-qc'>0.180 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-metric'><small>m_C</small><strong id='m71-mc'>174.0 kg/s</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-metric'><small>v_C</small><strong id='m71-vc'>2.55 m/s</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-metric'><small>rho_C</small><strong id='m71-rhoc'>966.7 kg/m^3</strong></div>
        </div>

        <div class='m71-card m71-bars'>
          <strong class='section'>Bilanca volumena i mase</strong>
          <div class='m71-bar-row'><span>Q_A / Q_C</span><strong id='m71-flow-a-label'>83.3 %</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-track'><div id='m71-flow-a-bar' class='m71-fill m71-flow-a'></div></div>
          <div class='m71-bar-row'><span>Q_B / Q_C</span><strong id='m71-flow-b-label'>16.7 %</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-track'><div id='m71-flow-b-bar' class='m71-fill m71-flow-b'></div></div>
          <div class='m71-bar-row'><span>m_A / m_C</span><strong id='m71-mass-a-label'>86.2 %</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-track'><div id='m71-mass-a-bar' class='m71-fill m71-flow-a'></div></div>
          <div class='m71-bar-row'><span>m_B / m_C</span><strong id='m71-mass-b-label'>13.8 %</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-track'><div id='m71-mass-b-bar' class='m71-fill m71-flow-b'></div></div>
          <div class='m71-bar-row'><span>m_C / m_C</span><strong id='m71-mass-c-label'>100 %</strong></div>
          <div class='m71-track'><div id='m71-mass-c-bar' class='m71-fill m71-flow-c'></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class='m71-card m71-formula'>
          <strong class='section'>Računski lanac</strong>
          <div id='m71-eq1'>rho_B = rho_A · rhorel</div>
          <div id='m71-eq2'>m_C = m_A + m_B</div>
          <div id='m71-eq3'>Q_C = Q_A + Q_B</div>
          <div id='m71-eq4'>v_C = Q_C / A_C, rho_C = m_C / Q_C</div>
        </div>

        <div class='m71-card m71-explainer'>
          <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
          <div id='m71-expl'>Komora zbraja masene tokove oba ulaza, a izlazna gustoća i brzina nastaju iz te zajedničke bilance.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('mixing-71-scene');
  if (!root) return;

  const canvas = root.querySelector('#m71-canvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const inputs = {
    qa: root.querySelector('#m71-qa'),
    qb: root.querySelector('#m71-qb'),
    dc: root.querySelector('#m71-dc'),
    rhoa: root.querySelector('#m71-rhoa'),
    rhorel: root.querySelector('#m71-rhorel')
  };
  const labels = {
    qa: root.querySelector('#m71-qa-label'),
    qb: root.querySelector('#m71-qb-label'),
    dc: root.querySelector('#m71-dc-label'),
    rhoa: root.querySelector('#m71-rhoa-label'),
    rhorel: root.querySelector('#m71-rhorel-label')
  };
  const out = {
    ovQc: root.querySelector('#m71-ov-qc'),
    ovMc: root.querySelector('#m71-ov-mc'),
    ovRhoc: root.querySelector('#m71-ov-rhoc'),
    ovVc: root.querySelector('#m71-ov-vc'),
    rhob: root.querySelector('#m71-rhob'),
    ac: root.querySelector('#m71-ac'),
    qc: root.querySelector('#m71-qc'),
    mc: root.querySelector('#m71-mc'),
    vc: root.querySelector('#m71-vc'),
    rhoc: root.querySelector('#m71-rhoc'),
    flowABar: root.querySelector('#m71-flow-a-bar'),
    flowBBar: root.querySelector('#m71-flow-b-bar'),
    massABar: root.querySelector('#m71-mass-a-bar'),
    massBBar: root.querySelector('#m71-mass-b-bar'),
    massCBar: root.querySelector('#m71-mass-c-bar'),
    flowALabel: root.querySelector('#m71-flow-a-label'),
    flowBLabel: root.querySelector('#m71-flow-b-label'),
    massALabel: root.querySelector('#m71-mass-a-label'),
    massBLabel: root.querySelector('#m71-mass-b-label'),
    massCLabel: root.querySelector('#m71-mass-c-label'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#m71-eq1'),
    eq2: root.querySelector('#m71-eq2'),
    eq3: root.querySelector('#m71-eq3'),
    eq4: root.querySelector('#m71-eq4'),
    expl: root.querySelector('#m71-expl')
  };

  const waterParticles = Array.from({ length: 24 }, function(_, index) {
    return { t: index / 24 };
  });
  const oilParticles = Array.from({ length: 18 }, function(_, index) {
    return { t: index / 18 };
  });
  const outParticles = Array.from({ length: 34 }, function() {
    return { t: Math.random(), lane: Math.random() };
  });
  const chamberDots = Array.from({ length: 28 }, function() {
    return { angle: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2, radius: .25 + Math.random() * .7, lane: Math.random() };
  });
  let latest = null;
  let phase = 0;

  function fmt(value, digits) {
    return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
  }

  function mixColor(fraction) {
    const a = { r: 14, g: 165, b: 233 };
    const b = { r: 217, g: 119, b: 6 };
    const r = Math.round(a.r * (1 - fraction) + b.r * fraction);
    const g = Math.round(a.g * (1 - fraction) + b.g * fraction);
    const blue = Math.round(a.b * (1 - fraction) + b.b * fraction);
    return 'rgb(' + r + ', ' + g + ', ' + blue + ')';
  }

  function roundedRect(x, y, w, h, r) {
    const radius = Math.min(r, w / 2, h / 2);
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x + radius, y);
    ctx.lineTo(x + w - radius, y);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + radius);
    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - radius);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - radius, y + h);
    ctx.lineTo(x + radius, y + h);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - radius);
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + radius);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + radius, y);
    ctx.closePath();
  }

  function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
    const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
    const head = 10;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = width;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
    ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 10);
  }

  function compute() {
    const qa = parseFloat(inputs.qa.value) / 1000;
    const qb = parseFloat(inputs.qb.value) / 1000;
    const dc = parseFloat(inputs.dc.value) / 100;
    const rhoa = parseFloat(inputs.rhoa.value);
    const rhorel = parseFloat(inputs.rhorel.value);
    const rhob = rhoa * rhorel;
    const ma = rhoa * qa;
    const mb = rhob * qb;
    const qc = qa + qb;
    const mc = ma + mb;
    const ac = Math.PI * dc * dc / 4;
    const vc = qc / Math.max(ac, 1e-6);
    const rhoc = mc / Math.max(qc, 1e-6);
    const oilVolumeShare = qb / Math.max(qc, 1e-6);
    const oilMassShare = mb / Math.max(mc, 1e-6);
    return { qa, qb, dc, rhoa, rhorel, rhob, ma, mb, qc, mc, ac, vc, rhoc, oilVolumeShare, oilMassShare };
  }

  function syncText(data) {
    labels.qa.textContent = fmt(data.qa * 1000, 0) + ' dm^3/s';
    labels.qb.textContent = fmt(data.qb * 1000, 0) + ' dm^3/s';
    labels.dc.textContent = fmt(data.dc * 100, 0) + ' cm';
    labels.rhoa.textContent = fmt(data.rhoa, 0) + ' kg/m^3';
    labels.rhorel.textContent = fmt(data.rhorel, 2);

    out.ovQc.textContent = fmt(data.qc, 3) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovMc.textContent = fmt(data.mc, 1) + ' kg/s';
    out.ovRhoc.textContent = fmt(data.rhoc, 1) + ' kg/m^3';
    out.ovVc.textContent = fmt(data.vc, 2) + ' m/s';
    out.rhob.textContent = fmt(data.rhob, 1) + ' kg/m^3';
    out.ac.textContent = fmt(data.ac, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.qc.textContent = fmt(data.qc, 3) + ' m^3/s';
    out.mc.textContent = fmt(data.mc, 1) + ' kg/s';
    out.vc.textContent = fmt(data.vc, 2) + ' m/s';
    out.rhoc.textContent = fmt(data.rhoc, 1) + ' kg/m^3';

    out.flowABar.style.width = ((data.qa / Math.max(data.qc, 1e-6)) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.flowBBar.style.width = ((data.qb / Math.max(data.qc, 1e-6)) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.massABar.style.width = ((data.ma / Math.max(data.mc, 1e-6)) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.massBBar.style.width = ((data.mb / Math.max(data.mc, 1e-6)) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.massCBar.style.width = '100%';
    out.flowALabel.textContent = ((data.qa / Math.max(data.qc, 1e-6)) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.flowBLabel.textContent = ((data.qb / Math.max(data.qc, 1e-6)) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.massALabel.textContent = ((data.ma / Math.max(data.mc, 1e-6)) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.massBLabel.textContent = ((data.mb / Math.max(data.mc, 1e-6)) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.massCLabel.textContent = '100 %';

    out.eq1.textContent = 'rho_B = ' + fmt(data.rhoa, 0) + ' · ' + fmt(data.rhorel, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.rhob, 1) + ' kg/m^3';
    out.eq2.textContent = 'm_C = ' + fmt(data.ma, 1) + ' + ' + fmt(data.mb, 1) + ' = ' + fmt(data.mc, 1) + ' kg/s';
    out.eq3.textContent = 'Q_C = ' + fmt(data.qa, 3) + ' + ' + fmt(data.qb, 3) + ' = ' + fmt(data.qc, 3) + ' m^3/s';
    out.eq4.textContent = 'v_C = ' + fmt(data.qc, 3) + ' / ' + fmt(data.ac, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(data.vc, 2) + ' m/s, rho_C = ' + fmt(data.mc, 1) + ' / ' + fmt(data.qc, 3) + ' = ' + fmt(data.rhoc, 1) + ' kg/m^3';
    out.expl.textContent = 'Tok A nosi ' + fmt(data.ma, 1) + ' kg/s vode, a tok B nosi ' + fmt(data.mb, 1) + ' kg/s ulja. Zajedno daju m_C = ' + fmt(data.mc, 1) + ' kg/s i Q_C = ' + fmt(data.qc, 3) + ' m^3/s. Zato na izlazu kroz presjek A_C = ' + fmt(data.ac, 4) + ' m^2 dobivaš v_C = ' + fmt(data.vc, 2) + ' m/s i rho_C = ' + fmt(data.rhoc, 1) + ' kg/m^3.';
  }

  function drawScene(data) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
    bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
    bg.addColorStop(1, '#eef7ff');
    ctx.fillStyle = bg;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const chamber = { x: 252, y: 148, w: 190, h: 188 };
    const mixColorValue = mixColor(data.oilMassShare);
    const outHeight = Math.max(42, Math.min(112, data.dc * 210));
    const outY = chamber.y + chamber.h / 2 - outHeight / 2;
    const outputCircleR = 20 + Math.sqrt(data.ac / Math.max(data.ac, 1e-6)) * 22;

    roundedRect(62, 226, chamber.x - 62, 34, 17);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(14,165,233,.16)';
    ctx.fill();
    roundedRect(chamber.x + 72, chamber.y + chamber.h, 34, 130, 17);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(217,119,6,.16)';
    ctx.fill();
    roundedRect(chamber.x + chamber.w, outY, 196, outHeight, 17);
    ctx.fillStyle = mixColorValue.replace('rgb', 'rgba').replace(')', ', 0.15)');
    ctx.fill();

    roundedRect(chamber.x, chamber.y, chamber.w, chamber.h, 28);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.95)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.stroke();

    const inner = ctx.createLinearGradient(chamber.x, chamber.y, chamber.x + chamber.w, chamber.y + chamber.h);
    inner.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(14,165,233,.16)');
    inner.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(124,58,237,.16)');
    ctx.fillStyle = inner;
    roundedRect(chamber.x + 10, chamber.y + 10, chamber.w - 20, chamber.h - 20, 24);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    roundedRect(62, 226, chamber.x - 62, 34, 17);
    ctx.stroke();
    roundedRect(chamber.x + 72, chamber.y + chamber.h, 34, 130, 17);
    ctx.stroke();
    roundedRect(chamber.x + chamber.w, outY, 196, outHeight, 17);
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(548, 64, 120, 120, 24);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.9)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,179,211,.55)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(608, 124, outputCircleR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = mixColorValue.replace('rgb', 'rgba').replace(')', ', 0.12)');
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = mixColorValue;
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.stroke();

    waterParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.004 + (data.qa / 0.18) * 0.008;
      if (particle.t > 1) particle.t = 0;
      const x = 62 + particle.t * (chamber.x - 62);
      const y = 243;
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0ea5e9';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    oilParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.003 + (data.qb / 0.08) * 0.008;
      if (particle.t > 1) particle.t = 0;
      const x = chamber.x + 89;
      const y = chamber.y + chamber.h + 130 - particle.t * 130;
      ctx.fillStyle = '#d97706';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    chamberDots.forEach(function(dot, index) {
      const radius = 30 + dot.radius * 42;
      const angle = dot.angle + phase * (0.45 + dot.lane * 0.35) + index * 0.03;
      const x = chamber.x + chamber.w / 2 + Math.cos(angle) * radius;
      const y = chamber.y + chamber.h / 2 + Math.sin(angle) * radius * 0.72;
      ctx.fillStyle = index % 2 === 0 ? 'rgba(56,189,248,.45)' : 'rgba(217,119,6,.4)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 4.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    outParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.004 + Math.max(data.vc / 5, 0.25) * 0.008;
      if (particle.t > 1) {
        particle.t = 0;
        particle.lane = Math.random();
      }
      const x = chamber.x + chamber.w + particle.t * 196;
      const y = outY + outHeight / 2 + (particle.lane - 0.5) * outHeight * 0.72;
      ctx.fillStyle = mixColorValue;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    roundedRect(244, 82, 206, 34, 17);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.88)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,179,211,.55)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#1f3d5a';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('m_A + m_B = m_C, Q_A + Q_B = Q_C', 258, 104);

    drawArrow(72, 204, 146, 204, '#0ea5e9', 4, 'A');
    drawArrow(chamber.x + 89, chamber.y + chamber.h + 112, chamber.x + 89, chamber.y + chamber.h + 42, '#d97706', 4, 'B');
    drawArrow(chamber.x + chamber.w + 16, outY - 22, chamber.x + chamber.w + 96, outY - 22, mixColorValue, 4, 'C');

    ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('Komora miješanja', chamber.x + 28, chamber.y - 14);
    ctx.fillText('Presjek C', 578, 172);
    ctx.fillText('rho_B = ' + fmt(data.rhob, 0) + ' kg/m^3', 66, 284);
    ctx.fillText('Udio ulja u masi: ' + fmt(data.oilMassShare * 100, 1) + ' %', 238, 408);
    ctx.fillText('Boja izlaza prati sastav mješavine', 224, 432);
  }

  function update() {
    latest = compute();
    syncText(latest);
  }

  function loop() {
    phase += 0.02;
    if (latest) drawScene(latest);
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
    input.addEventListener('input', update);
    input.addEventListener('change', update);
  });

  root.querySelector('#m71-preset-default').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.qa.value = '150';
    inputs.qb.value = '30';
    inputs.dc.value = '30';
    inputs.rhoa.value = '1000';
    inputs.rhorel.value = '0.8';
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#m71-preset-oil').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.qa.value = '120';
    inputs.qb.value = '60';
    inputs.dc.value = '30';
    inputs.rhoa.value = '1000';
    inputs.rhorel.value = '0.87';
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#m71-preset-wide').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.qa.value = '180';
    inputs.qb.value = '35';
    inputs.dc.value = '40';
    inputs.rhoa.value = '1000';
    inputs.rhorel.value = '0.78';
    update();
  });

  update();
  loop();
})();
</script>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z72 — Voda ustrujava u cilindrični spremnik na slici kroz cijev 1 brzinom strujanja 8 {.unnumbered}

Voda ustrujava u cilindrični spremnik na slici kroz cijev 1 brzinom strujanja 8,3 m/s, pri čemu istrujava kroz cijevi 2 i 3 brzinama 0,9 m/s i 3,6 m/s. Cijev označena brojem 4 otvorena je prema atmosferi. Unutarnji promjeri cijevi iznose $D_1 = 75 \text{ mm}$, $D_2 = 50 \text{ mm}$, $D_3 = 60 \text{ mm}$, $D_4 = 50 \text{ mm}$. Potrebno je odrediti brzinu promjene razine spremnika ($dh/dt$), te srednju brzinu ustrujavanja zraka kroz cijev 4. Pretpostaviti strujanje nestlačivim.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $v_1$ | $8,3 \text{ m/s}$ |
| $v_2$ | $0,9 \text{ m/s}$ |
| $v_3$ | $3,6 \text{ m/s}$ |
| $d_s$ | $0,61 \text{ m}$ |
| $D_1$ | $75 \text{ mm}$ |
| $D_2$ | $50 \text{ mm}$ |
| $D_3$ | $60 \text{ mm}$ |
| $D_4$ | $50 \text{ mm}$ |
| $\rho_v$ | $1000 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $\rho_z$ | $1,2 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- brzinu promjene razine spremnika ($dh/dt$) i srednju brzinu ustrujavanja zraka kroz cijev 4
- *Pretpostavke:** fluid je nestlačiv

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

#### **1. Fizikalni koncept (Bilanca mase)**
Budući da voda ulazi brže nego što izlazi kroz cijevi 2 i 3, masa tekućine unutar spremnika će se povećavati. To uzrokuje podizanje razine vode ($dh/dt$). Prema zakonu o očuvanju mase:
$$\text{Ulazna masa} - \text{Izlazna masa} = \text{Promjena mase u spremniku}$$
$$\dot{m}_1 - (\dot{m}_2 + \dot{m}_3) = \frac{dm_{spremnik}}{dt}$$

#### **2. Izračun površina presjeka ($A$):**
Površine računamo standardno kao $A = \frac{D^2 \pi}{4}$:
*   $A_1 = \frac{0,075^2 \pi}{4} = \mathbf{4,42 \cdot 10^{-3} \text{ m}^2}$
*   $A_2 = \frac{0,05^2 \pi}{4} = \mathbf{1,96 \cdot 10^{-3} \text{ m}^2}$ (isto vrijedi i za $A_4$ jer je promjer isti)
*   $A_3 = \frac{0,06^2 \pi}{4} = \mathbf{2,83 \cdot 10^{-3} \text{ m}^2}$
*   $A_s = \frac{0,61^2 \pi}{4} = \mathbf{292,25 \cdot 10^{-3} \text{ m}^2}$ (površina spremnika)

#### **3. Izračun brzine promjene razine ($dh/dt$):**
Uvrštavamo masene protoke ($\dot{m} = \rho A v$) u jednadžbu bilance. Budući da je voda nestlačiva ($\rho = konst.$), gustoća se krati:
$$A_1 v_1 - A_2 v_2 - A_3 v_3 = A_s \frac{dh}{dt}$$
Izoliramo $dh/dt$:
$$\frac{dh}{dt} = \frac{A_1 v_1 - A_2 v_2 - A_3 v_3}{A_s}$$
$$\frac{dh}{dt} = \frac{(4,42 \cdot 10^{-3} \cdot 8,3) - (1,96 \cdot 10^{-3} \cdot 0,9) - (2,83 \cdot 10^{-3} \cdot 3,6)}{292,25 \cdot 10^{-3}}$$
$$\frac{dh}{dt} = \mathbf{0,0846 \text{ m/s}}$$

#### **4. Fizikalni koncept za zrak (Cijev 4)**
Kako se razina vode podiže, ona zauzima prostor u kojem je bio zrak. Taj zrak mora izaći van kroz cijev 4. Volumen zraka koji istrujava u sekundi jednak je volumenu za koji se "povećala" voda u spremniku.
$$\text{Volumenski protok zraka} = A_s \cdot \frac{dh}{dt}$$

#### **5. Izračun brzine zraka ($v_{4sr}$):**
Iz jednadžbe kontinuiteta za zrak u cijevi 4:
$$A_4 \cdot v_{4sr} = A_s \cdot \frac{dh}{dt}$$
$$v_{4sr} = \frac{A_s \cdot \frac{dh}{dt}}{A_4} = \frac{292,25 \cdot 10^{-3} \cdot 0,0846}{1,96 \cdot 10^{-3}}$$
$$v_{4sr} = \mathbf{12,59 \text{ m/s}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="tank-widget-72-premium" style="display:none;font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:1060px;margin:2rem auto;border:1px solid rgba(30,90,145,.14);border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#f7fbff);box-shadow:0 22px 54px rgba(28,73,117,.12);color:#17324d;">
  <style>
    #tank-widget-72-premium *{box-sizing:border-box}#tank-widget-72-premium .hero{padding:1.25rem 1.4rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(86,204,242,.22),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#fff 52%,#f2fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(30,90,145,.12)}#tank-widget-72-premium .hero h3{margin:0 0 .35rem;font-size:1.25rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .hero p{margin:0;color:#53718b;line-height:1.55;font-size:.95rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem;padding:1rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .card{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(30,90,145,.1);border-radius:18px;box-shadow:0 12px 26px rgba(28,73,117,.08)}#tank-widget-72-premium .controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.9rem;align-content:start;order:2}#tank-widget-72-premium .controls h4,#tank-widget-72-premium .viz h4{margin:0;font-size:.82rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#62809a}#tank-widget-72-premium .row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.3rem;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#274864}#tank-widget-72-premium .row input{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}#tank-widget-72-premium .note{padding:.85rem .95rem;border-radius:14px;background:rgba(47,128,237,.06);border:1px solid rgba(47,128,237,.1);font-size:.88rem;color:#4f6e88;line-height:1.55}#tank-widget-72-premium .viz{display:grid;gap:1rem;order:1}#tank-widget-72-premium .top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;gap:1rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .tank{position:relative;min-height:470px;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#edf7ff,#f8fbff)}#tank-widget-72-premium .grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(86,116,143,.08) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(86,116,143,.08) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:28px 28px;opacity:.45}#tank-widget-72-premium .shell{position:absolute;left:31%;top:18%;width:38%;height:65%;border:4px solid #2d597d;border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 28px 28px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.55),rgba(255,255,255,.1));overflow:hidden}#tank-widget-72-premium .rim{position:absolute;left:31%;top:16%;width:38%;height:18px;border:4px solid #2d597d;border-bottom:none;border-radius:30px 30px 0 0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.82)}#tank-widget-72-premium .fill{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:52%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(86,204,242,.8),rgba(47,128,237,.9) 58%,rgba(26,95,180,.98));transition:height .45s ease;overflow:hidden}#tank-widget-72-premium .fill:before,#tank-widget-72-premium .fill:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:-10%;width:120%;height:20px;top:-8px;border-radius:45%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.34);animation:mf1tankwave 5.5s linear infinite}#tank-widget-72-premium .fill:after{top:-12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);animation-duration:7s;animation-direction:reverse}#tank-widget-72-premium .waterline{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;top:0;height:4px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.82);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,.55)}#tank-widget-72-premium .level{position:absolute;right:1rem;top:20%;padding:.38rem .62rem;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.84);border:1px solid rgba(22,50,79,.08);font-size:.82rem;font-weight:800;color:#36536d}#tank-widget-72-premium .pipe{position:absolute;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f9fcff,#dde9f6);border:3px solid #416383;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,.32)}#tank-widget-72-premium .p1{left:8%;top:36%;width:24%;height:34px;border-right:none;border-radius:18px 0 0 18px}#tank-widget-72-premium .p2{left:37.5%;bottom:7%;width:32px;height:18%;border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 16px 16px}#tank-widget-72-premium .p3{right:8%;top:56%;width:24%;height:34px;border-left:none;border-radius:0 18px 18px 0}#tank-widget-72-premium .p4{left:47%;top:5.5%;width:30px;height:13%;border-bottom:none;border-radius:16px 16px 0 0}#tank-widget-72-premium .pl{position:absolute;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;color:#385873;background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.12);border-radius:999px;padding:.25rem .5rem;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(34,66,98,.08)}#tank-widget-72-premium .l1{left:6%;top:30%}#tank-widget-72-premium .l2{left:34%;bottom:1.5%}#tank-widget-72-premium .l3{right:5%;top:50%}#tank-widget-72-premium .l4{left:52%;top:1.5%;transform:translateX(-50%)}#tank-widget-72-premium .track{position:absolute;inset:3px;overflow:hidden;border-radius:inherit}#tank-widget-72-premium .flow{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:.95;transition:transform .35s ease,opacity .35s ease}#tank-widget-72-premium .in{background:radial-gradient(circle at 14% 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.8) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 0 50%/34px 100% repeat-x,linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(86,204,242,.08),rgba(47,128,237,.7),rgba(86,204,242,.08));animation:mf1right 1.2s linear infinite}#tank-widget-72-premium .out{background:radial-gradient(circle at 86% 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.78) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 0 50%/34px 100% repeat-x,linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(86,204,242,.08),rgba(47,128,237,.68),rgba(86,204,242,.08));animation:mf1left 1.3s linear infinite}#tank-widget-72-premium .down{background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 14%,rgba(255,255,255,.78) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 50% 0/100% 34px repeat-y,linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(86,204,242,.08),rgba(47,128,237,.68),rgba(86,204,242,.08));animation:mf1down 1.15s linear infinite}#tank-widget-72-premium .air{background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%,rgba(255,255,255,.88) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 50% 0/100% 28px repeat-y,linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(148,163,184,.06),rgba(148,163,184,.5),rgba(148,163,184,.06))}#tank-widget-72-premium .air.outward{animation:mf1up 1.05s linear infinite}#tank-widget-72-premium .air.inward{animation:mf1down 1.05s linear infinite}#tank-widget-72-premium .bars,#tank-widget-72-premium .formula,#tank-widget-72-premium .metrics{padding:1rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .bars h4,#tank-widget-72-premium .formula h4,#tank-widget-72-premium .metrics h4{margin:0 0 .9rem;font-size:.98rem;color:#1a4266}#tank-widget-72-premium .bh{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.88rem;color:#486782;font-weight:700}#tank-widget-72-premium .bt{height:14px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(141,174,204,.18);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.9rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .bf{height:100%;border-radius:inherit;width:0;transition:width .35s ease}#tank-widget-72-premium .bfi{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#56ccf2,#2f80ed)}#tank-widget-72-premium .bfo{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f2994a,#d1495b)}#tank-widget-72-premium .pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;margin-top:.25rem;padding:.42rem .72rem;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(47,128,237,.08);border:1px solid rgba(47,128,237,.14);font-size:.82rem;font-weight:800;color:#295275}#tank-widget-72-premium .box{padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.74);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.12);line-height:1.65;color:#355771;margin-top:.95rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .gridm{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.85rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .metric{padding:.85rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fafdff,#eef7ff);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.1)}#tank-widget-72-premium .metric .k{display:block;font-size:.77rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#67829c;margin-bottom:.35rem}#tank-widget-72-premium .metric .v{font-size:1.08rem;font-weight:800;color:#10395e;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}#tank-widget-72-premium .metric .s{margin-top:.25rem;font-size:.78rem;color:#64819b}#tank-widget-72-premium .eq{font-family:"Cambria Math","STIX Two Math",serif;font-size:1.02rem;color:#143d62}#tank-widget-72-premium .small{font-size:.84rem;color:#64819b;margin-top:.55rem}@keyframes mf1tankwave{from{transform:translateX(-7%)}to{transform:translateX(7%)}}@keyframes mf1right{from{background-position:0 50%,0 0}to{background-position:34px 50%,0 0}}@keyframes mf1left{from{background-position:0 50%,0 0}to{background-position:-34px 50%,0 0}}@keyframes mf1down{from{background-position:50% 0,0 0}to{background-position:50% 34px,0 0}}@keyframes mf1up{from{background-position:50% 0,0 0}to{background-position:50% -34px,0 0}}@media (max-width:980px){#tank-widget-72-premium .wrap,#tank-widget-72-premium .top{grid-template-columns:1fr}#tank-widget-72-premium .gridm{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}@media (max-width:640px){#tank-widget-72-premium .gridm{grid-template-columns:1fr}#tank-widget-72-premium .tank{min-height:400px}}
  </style>
  <div class="hero">
    <h3>Widget 72: Spremnik, razina vode i odzračivanje</h3>
    <p>Bilanca volumenskih protoka određuje raste li ili pada razina vode. Cijev 4 automatski prikazuje smjer strujanja zraka: pri punjenju zrak izlazi, a pri pražnjenju ulazi u spremnik.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="viz">
      <div class="top">
        <div class="card tank">
          <div class="grid"></div>
          <div class="pipe p1"><div class="track"><div id="tank72-stream1" class="flow in"></div></div></div>
          <div class="pipe p2"><div class="track"><div id="tank72-stream2" class="flow down"></div></div></div>
          <div class="pipe p3"><div class="track"><div id="tank72-stream3" class="flow out"></div></div></div>
          <div class="pipe p4"><div class="track"><div id="tank72-stream4" class="flow air outward"></div></div></div>
          <div class="pl l1">1: ulaz</div><div class="pl l2">2: izlaz</div><div class="pl l3">3: izlaz</div><div class="pl l4">4: zrak</div>
          <div class="rim"></div>
          <div class="shell"><div id="tank72-fill" class="fill"><div class="waterline"></div></div></div>
          <div id="tank72-level" class="level">razina raste</div>
        </div>
        <div class="card bars">
          <h4>Bilanca volumenskih protoka</h4>
          <div class="bh"><span>Ulaz Q_in = A1 v1</span><span id="tank72-qin">0.0367 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div class="bt"><div id="tank72-bar-in" class="bf bfi"></div></div>
          <div class="bh"><span>Izlaz Q_out = A2 v2 + A3 v3</span><span id="tank72-qout">0.0119 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div class="bt"><div id="tank72-bar-out" class="bf bfo"></div></div>
          <div id="tank72-status" class="pill">Q_in &gt; Q_out: spremnik se puni</div>
          <div class="box"><strong>Smjer zraka u cijevi 4</strong><br><span id="tank72-air-note">Zrak izlazi iz spremnika jer voda zauzima sve veći volumen.</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card controls">
        <div class="note"><strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Razinu ne određuje pojedinačna cijev nego neto bilanca <span class="eq">Q_in - Q_out</span>. Kad voda u spremniku zauzima sve veći volumen, zrak mora izaći kroz odzračnik; kad razina pada, smjer zraka se obrće.</div>
        <h4>Brzine strujanja</h4>
        <div class="row"><label for="tank72-v1"><span>Ulazna brzina v1</span><span id="tank72-v1-val">8.3 m/s</span></label><input id="tank72-v1" type="range" min="0" max="15" step="0.1" value="8.3"></div>
        <div class="row"><label for="tank72-v2"><span>Izlazna brzina v2</span><span id="tank72-v2-val">0.9 m/s</span></label><input id="tank72-v2" type="range" min="0" max="5" step="0.1" value="0.9"></div>
        <div class="row"><label for="tank72-v3"><span>Izlazna brzina v3</span><span id="tank72-v3-val">3.6 m/s</span></label><input id="tank72-v3" type="range" min="0" max="8" step="0.1" value="3.6"></div>
        <h4>Geometrija</h4>
        <div class="row"><label for="tank72-ds"><span>Promjer spremnika d_s</span><span id="tank72-ds-val">0.61 m</span></label><input id="tank72-ds" type="range" min="0.3" max="1.0" step="0.01" value="0.61"></div>
        <div class="row"><label for="tank72-d1"><span>Promjer D1</span><span id="tank72-d1-val">75 mm</span></label><input id="tank72-d1" type="range" min="30" max="120" step="1" value="75"></div>
        <div class="row"><label for="tank72-d2"><span>Promjer D2</span><span id="tank72-d2-val">50 mm</span></label><input id="tank72-d2" type="range" min="30" max="120" step="1" value="50"></div>
        <div class="row"><label for="tank72-d3"><span>Promjer D3</span><span id="tank72-d3-val">60 mm</span></label><input id="tank72-d3" type="range" min="30" max="120" step="1" value="60"></div>
        <div class="row"><label for="tank72-d4"><span>Promjer D4</span><span id="tank72-d4-val">50 mm</span></label><input id="tank72-d4" type="range" min="30" max="120" step="1" value="50"></div>
        <div class="note">Debljina animiranih tokova prati volumenski protok <span class="eq">Q = A v</span>. Pozitivan <span class="eq">dh/dt</span> podiže razinu, a negativan spušta razinu i okreće zračni tok.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="card metrics">
        <h4>Rezultati u stvarnom vremenu</h4>
        <div class="gridm">
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">dh/dt</span><span id="tank72-dhdt" class="v">0.0846 m/s</span><div id="tank72-dhdt-note" class="s">Pozitivno: razina raste</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">v4,sr</span><span id="tank72-v4" class="v">12.59 m/s</span><div id="tank72-v4-note" class="s">Zrak izlazi kroz odzračnik</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A_s</span><span id="tank72-as" class="v">0.2923 m^2</span><div class="s">Površina slobodne plohe</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">Neto protok</span><span id="tank72-qnet" class="v">0.0247 m^3/s</span><div class="s">Q_in - Q_out</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card formula">
        <h4>Jednadžba kontinuiteta</h4>
        <div class="box" style="margin-top:0">
          <div class="eq">dh/dt = (A1 v1 - A2 v2 - A3 v3) / A_s</div>
          <div id="tank72-eq-main" style="margin-top:.55rem">dh/dt = (0.00442·8.30 - 0.00196·0.90 - 0.00283·3.60) / 0.29225 = 0.0846 m/s</div>
          <div id="tank72-eq-air" style="margin-top:.55rem">v4,sr = A_s·(dh/dt)/A4 = 12.59 m/s</div>
          <div class="small">Pozitivan predznak znači porast razine i izbacivanje zraka. Negativan predznak znači pad razine i ulazak zraka.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('tank-widget-72-premium');
  if (!root) return;
  const sliders = ['v1','v2','v3','ds','d1','d2','d3','d4'].reduce((a,k)=>{a[k]=root.querySelector('#tank72-'+k);return a;},{});
  const vals = ['v1','v2','v3','ds','d1','d2','d3','d4'].reduce((a,k)=>{a[k]=root.querySelector('#tank72-'+k+'-val');return a;},{});
  const el = {
    fill: root.querySelector('#tank72-fill'), level: root.querySelector('#tank72-level'),
    qin: root.querySelector('#tank72-qin'), qout: root.querySelector('#tank72-qout'), qnet: root.querySelector('#tank72-qnet'),
    barIn: root.querySelector('#tank72-bar-in'), barOut: root.querySelector('#tank72-bar-out'),
    status: root.querySelector('#tank72-status'), airNote: root.querySelector('#tank72-air-note'),
    dhdt: root.querySelector('#tank72-dhdt'), dhdtNote: root.querySelector('#tank72-dhdt-note'),
    v4: root.querySelector('#tank72-v4'), v4Note: root.querySelector('#tank72-v4-note'),
    as: root.querySelector('#tank72-as'), eqMain: root.querySelector('#tank72-eq-main'), eqAir: root.querySelector('#tank72-eq-air'),
    s1: root.querySelector('#tank72-stream1'), s2: root.querySelector('#tank72-stream2'), s3: root.querySelector('#tank72-stream3'), s4: root.querySelector('#tank72-stream4')
  };
  function areaMm(mm){const d=mm/1000;return Math.PI*d*d/4;}
  function fmt(v,d){return Number(v).toFixed(d);}
  function strength(node,q,maxq,min){const r=maxq>0?q/maxq:0;const s=Math.max(min,Math.min(1,r));node.style.transform='scale('+s+')';node.style.opacity=String(.25+s*.75);node.style.animationDuration=(Math.max(.35,1.7-s*1.1)).toFixed(2)+'s';}
  function update() {
    const v1=parseFloat(sliders.v1.value),v2=parseFloat(sliders.v2.value),v3=parseFloat(sliders.v3.value),ds=parseFloat(sliders.ds.value),d1=parseFloat(sliders.d1.value),d2=parseFloat(sliders.d2.value),d3=parseFloat(sliders.d3.value),d4=parseFloat(sliders.d4.value);
    vals.v1.textContent=fmt(v1,1)+' m/s'; vals.v2.textContent=fmt(v2,1)+' m/s'; vals.v3.textContent=fmt(v3,1)+' m/s'; vals.ds.textContent=fmt(ds,2)+' m'; vals.d1.textContent=fmt(d1,0)+' mm'; vals.d2.textContent=fmt(d2,0)+' mm'; vals.d3.textContent=fmt(d3,0)+' mm'; vals.d4.textContent=fmt(d4,0)+' mm';
    const A1=areaMm(d1),A2=areaMm(d2),A3=areaMm(d3),A4=areaMm(d4),As=Math.PI*ds*ds/4,Qin=A1*v1,Qout2=A2*v2,Qout3=A3*v3,Qout=Qout2+Qout3,Qnet=Qin-Qout,dhdt=Qnet/As,v4=A4>0?(As*dhdt)/A4:0;
    el.qin.textContent=fmt(Qin,4)+' m^3/s'; el.qout.textContent=fmt(Qout,4)+' m^3/s'; el.qnet.textContent=fmt(Qnet,4)+' m^3/s'; el.as.textContent=fmt(As,4)+' m^2'; el.dhdt.textContent=fmt(dhdt,4)+' m/s'; el.v4.textContent=fmt(Math.abs(v4),2)+' m/s';
    const ref=Math.max(Qin,Qout,.0001); el.barIn.style.width=(Qin/ref*100).toFixed(1)+'%'; el.barOut.style.width=(Qout/ref*100).toFixed(1)+'%';
    el.fill.style.height=Math.max(10,Math.min(88,50+dhdt*360)).toFixed(1)+'%';
    const qmax=Math.max(Qin,Qout2,Qout3,Math.abs(As*dhdt),.0001); strength(el.s1,Qin,qmax,.16); strength(el.s2,Qout2,qmax,.12); strength(el.s3,Qout3,qmax,.12); strength(el.s4,Math.abs(As*dhdt),qmax,.12);
    if (dhdt > 0.0005) { el.level.textContent='razina raste'; el.dhdtNote.textContent='Pozitivno: razina raste'; el.v4Note.textContent='Zrak izlazi kroz odzračnik'; el.status.textContent='Q_in > Q_out: spremnik se puni'; el.airNote.textContent='Zrak izlazi iz spremnika jer voda zauzima sve veći volumen.'; el.s4.classList.remove('inward'); el.s4.classList.add('outward'); }
    else if (dhdt < -0.0005) { el.level.textContent='razina pada'; el.dhdtNote.textContent='Negativno: razina pada'; el.v4Note.textContent='Zrak ulazi kroz odzračnik'; el.status.textContent='Q_out > Q_in: spremnik se prazni'; el.airNote.textContent='Zrak ulazi u spremnik kako bi nadomjestio volumen koji voda izgubi.'; el.s4.classList.remove('outward'); el.s4.classList.add('inward'); }
    else { el.level.textContent='razina miruje'; el.dhdtNote.textContent='Bilanca je gotovo uravnotežena'; el.v4Note.textContent='Zrak gotovo miruje'; el.status.textContent='Q_in ≈ Q_out: razina je praktički stalna'; el.airNote.textContent='Ulaz i izlaz su gotovo izjednačeni pa odzračnik nema izražen smjer.'; el.s4.classList.remove('inward'); el.s4.classList.add('outward'); }
    el.eqMain.textContent='dh/dt = ('+fmt(A1,5)+'·'+fmt(v1,2)+' - '+fmt(A2,5)+'·'+fmt(v2,2)+' - '+fmt(A3,5)+'·'+fmt(v3,2)+') / '+fmt(As,5)+' = '+fmt(dhdt,4)+' m/s';
    el.eqAir.textContent='v4,sr = '+fmt(As,5)+'·('+fmt(dhdt,4)+')/'+fmt(A4,5)+' = '+fmt(Math.abs(v4),2)+' m/s';
  }
  Object.values(sliders).forEach(s => s.addEventListener('input', update));
  update();
})();
</script>

```

```{=html}
<div id='tank-72-scene' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
  <style>
    #tank-72-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-shell{border:1px solid #dbe7f0;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f7fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 56px rgba(35,73,107,.1)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(56,189,248,.15),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#ffffff 58%,#f2fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(35,73,107,.08)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5c7d95;margin-bottom:.35rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.36rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#143b61}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#56728a;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff7ff,#fbfdff);color:#1d4f78;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #d7e8f8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff7ff,#f8fbff);color:#2d587f;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-stage{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.85rem;padding:.9rem;border-radius:22px;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#eef6ff 68%,#e7f2fb 100%)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-stage canvas{display:block;flex:1 0 100%;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:18px}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.55rem;flex:1 1 760px;padding:0;border:none;background:transparent;box-shadow:none}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-overlay div{display:grid;gap:.25rem;min-width:0;padding:.78rem .86rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(207,227,247,.98);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#3a5671}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-overlay span{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:800;color:#123a63}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-state{position:static;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;align-self:start;padding:.72rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:800}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-state.fill{color:#b45309;border-color:#fdba74;background:rgba(255,247,237,.96)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-state.drain{color:#7c3aed;border-color:#ddd6fe;background:rgba(250,245,255,.96)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-state.steady{color:#1d4ed8;border-color:#93c5fd;background:rgba(239,246,255,.95)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-card{border:1px solid #e3ebf2;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#eff7ff;color:#1d4f78;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfdff 0%,#eef7ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.08)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#6a849a}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-bars,#tank-72-scene .t72-formula,#tank-72-scene .t72-explainer{padding:1rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-bars strong.section,#tank-72-scene .t72-formula strong.section,#tank-72-scene .t72-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.75rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-qin{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,#2563eb)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-qout{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fb7185,#ef4444)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-qnet{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fbbf24,#f59e0b)}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
    #tank-72-scene .t72-explainer{grid-column:1 / -1;border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
    @media (max-width:980px){
      #tank-72-scene .t72-head,#tank-72-scene .t72-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      #tank-72-scene .t72-chip{justify-self:start}
      #tank-72-scene .t72-overlay{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}
      #tank-72-scene .t72-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
    @media (max-width:640px){
      #tank-72-scene .t72-overlay,#tank-72-scene .t72-presets,#tank-72-scene .t72-metrics{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
  </style>
  <div class='t72-shell'>
    <div class='t72-head'>
      <div>
        <div class='t72-kicker'>Zadatak 72 · spremnik i odzračnik</div>
        <h3 class='t72-title'>Razinu spremnika određuje samo neto volumen tekućine, a odzračnik mora prenijeti točno isti volumen zraka u suprotnom smjeru</h3>
        <p class='t72-sub'>Ne promatraš cijevi odvojeno, nego ukupnu bilancu <strong>Q_in - Q_out</strong>. Ako je neto volumen pozitivan, voda zauzima više prostora i zrak mora izaći. Ako je negativan, spremnik gubi volumen tekućine pa zrak mora ući unutra. Tek iz tog volumena dobivaš <strong>dh/dt</strong> i srednju brzinu zraka u cijevi 4.</p>
      </div>
      <div class='t72-chip'>dh/dt = (Q_in - Q_out) / A_s</div>
    </div>

    <div class='t72-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> plava cijev 1 puni spremnik, cijevi 2 i 3 ga prazne, a uski odzračnik 4 mora primiti isti volumenski tok zraka kao što se mijenja volumen vode u spremniku. Zato je <strong>v4</strong> često znatno veći od <strong>dh/dt</strong>: isti volumen prolazi kroz mnogo manji presjek.</div>

    <div class='t72-grid'>
      <div class='t72-stage'>
        <canvas id='t72-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
        <div class='t72-overlay'>
          <div><strong>Q_in</strong><span id='t72-ov-qin'>0.0367 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>Q_out</strong><span id='t72-ov-qout'>0.0119 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>dh/dt</strong><span id='t72-ov-dhdt'>0.0846 m/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>v4</strong><span id='t72-ov-v4'>12.59 m/s</span></div>
        </div>
        <div id='t72-state' class='t72-state fill'>Spremnik se puni</div>
      </div>

      <div class='t72-side'>
        <div class='t72-card t72-controls'>
          <div class='t72-presets'>
            <button type='button' class='t72-preset' id='t72-preset-fill'>Punjenje</button>
            <button type='button' class='t72-preset' id='t72-preset-balance'>Ravnoteža</button>
            <button type='button' class='t72-preset' id='t72-preset-drain'>Pražnjenje</button>
          </div>

          <div class='t72-row'><label for='t72-v1'><span>Ulazna brzina v1</span><span id='t72-v1-label'>8.3 m/s</span></label><input id='t72-v1' type='range' min='0' max='15' step='0.1' value='8.3'></div>
          <div class='t72-row'><label for='t72-v2'><span>Izlazna brzina v2</span><span id='t72-v2-label'>0.9 m/s</span></label><input id='t72-v2' type='range' min='0' max='5' step='0.1' value='0.9'></div>
          <div class='t72-row'><label for='t72-v3'><span>Izlazna brzina v3</span><span id='t72-v3-label'>3.6 m/s</span></label><input id='t72-v3' type='range' min='0' max='8' step='0.1' value='3.6'></div>
          <div class='t72-row'><label for='t72-ds'><span>Promjer spremnika d_s</span><span id='t72-ds-label'>0.61 m</span></label><input id='t72-ds' type='range' min='0.3' max='1.0' step='0.01' value='0.61'></div>
          <div class='t72-row'><label for='t72-d1'><span>Promjer D1</span><span id='t72-d1-label'>75 mm</span></label><input id='t72-d1' type='range' min='30' max='120' step='1' value='75'></div>
          <div class='t72-row'><label for='t72-d2'><span>Promjer D2</span><span id='t72-d2-label'>50 mm</span></label><input id='t72-d2' type='range' min='30' max='120' step='1' value='50'></div>
          <div class='t72-row'><label for='t72-d3'><span>Promjer D3</span><span id='t72-d3-label'>60 mm</span></label><input id='t72-d3' type='range' min='30' max='120' step='1' value='60'></div>
          <div class='t72-row'><label for='t72-d4'><span>Promjer D4</span><span id='t72-d4-label'>50 mm</span></label><input id='t72-d4' type='range' min='30' max='120' step='1' value='50'></div>
        </div>

        <div class='t72-card t72-metrics'>
          <div class='t72-metric'><small>A_s</small><strong id='t72-As'>0.2923 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='t72-metric'><small>A4</small><strong id='t72-A4'>0.0020 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='t72-metric'><small>Q_in</small><strong id='t72-Qin'>0.0367 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='t72-metric'><small>Q_out</small><strong id='t72-Qout'>0.0119 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='t72-metric'><small>Q_net</small><strong id='t72-Qnet'>0.0247 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='t72-metric'><small>v4</small><strong id='t72-v4'>12.59 m/s</strong></div>
        </div>

        <div class='t72-card t72-bars'>
          <strong class='section'>Bilanca volumena</strong>
          <div class='t72-bar-row'><span>Q_in</span><strong id='t72-qin-label'>100 %</strong></div>
          <div class='t72-track'><div id='t72-qin-bar' class='t72-fill t72-qin'></div></div>
          <div class='t72-bar-row'><span>Q_out</span><strong id='t72-qout-label'>32.3 %</strong></div>
          <div class='t72-track'><div id='t72-qout-bar' class='t72-fill t72-qout'></div></div>
          <div class='t72-bar-row'><span>|Q_net|</span><strong id='t72-qnet-label'>67.7 %</strong></div>
          <div class='t72-track'><div id='t72-qnet-bar' class='t72-fill t72-qnet'></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class='t72-card t72-formula'>
          <strong class='section'>Računski lanac</strong>
          <div id='t72-eq1'>Q_in = A1 v1, Q_out = A2 v2 + A3 v3</div>
          <div id='t72-eq2'>dh/dt = (Q_in - Q_out) / A_s</div>
          <div id='t72-eq3'>v4 = A_s (dh/dt) / A4</div>
        </div>

        <div class='t72-card t72-explainer'>
          <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
          <div id='t72-expl'>Ulaz volumena je veći od izlaza, pa se spremnik puni i zrak mora izlaziti kroz cijev 4.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('tank-72-scene');
  if (!root) return;

  const canvas = root.querySelector('#t72-canvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const inputs = {
    v1: root.querySelector('#t72-v1'),
    v2: root.querySelector('#t72-v2'),
    v3: root.querySelector('#t72-v3'),
    ds: root.querySelector('#t72-ds'),
    d1: root.querySelector('#t72-d1'),
    d2: root.querySelector('#t72-d2'),
    d3: root.querySelector('#t72-d3'),
    d4: root.querySelector('#t72-d4')
  };
  const labels = {
    v1: root.querySelector('#t72-v1-label'),
    v2: root.querySelector('#t72-v2-label'),
    v3: root.querySelector('#t72-v3-label'),
    ds: root.querySelector('#t72-ds-label'),
    d1: root.querySelector('#t72-d1-label'),
    d2: root.querySelector('#t72-d2-label'),
    d3: root.querySelector('#t72-d3-label'),
    d4: root.querySelector('#t72-d4-label')
  };
  const out = {
    ovQin: root.querySelector('#t72-ov-qin'),
    ovQout: root.querySelector('#t72-ov-qout'),
    ovDhdt: root.querySelector('#t72-ov-dhdt'),
    ovV4: root.querySelector('#t72-ov-v4'),
    state: root.querySelector('#t72-state'),
    As: root.querySelector('#t72-As'),
    A4: root.querySelector('#t72-A4'),
    Qin: root.querySelector('#t72-Qin'),
    Qout: root.querySelector('#t72-Qout'),
    Qnet: root.querySelector('#t72-Qnet'),
    v4: root.querySelector('#t72-v4'),
    qinBar: root.querySelector('#t72-qin-bar'),
    qoutBar: root.querySelector('#t72-qout-bar'),
    qnetBar: root.querySelector('#t72-qnet-bar'),
    qinLabel: root.querySelector('#t72-qin-label'),
    qoutLabel: root.querySelector('#t72-qout-label'),
    qnetLabel: root.querySelector('#t72-qnet-label'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#t72-eq1'),
    eq2: root.querySelector('#t72-eq2'),
    eq3: root.querySelector('#t72-eq3'),
    expl: root.querySelector('#t72-expl')
  };

  const inletParticles = Array.from({ length: 24 }, function(_, index) {
    return { t: index / 24, lane: Math.random() };
  });
  const bottomParticles = Array.from({ length: 18 }, function() {
    return { t: Math.random() };
  });
  const sideParticles = Array.from({ length: 18 }, function() {
    return { t: Math.random(), lane: Math.random() };
  });
  const airParticles = Array.from({ length: 18 }, function() {
    return { t: Math.random(), lane: Math.random() };
  });
  let latest = null;
  let phase = 0;

  function fmt(value, digits) {
    return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
  }

  function areaFromMm(mm) {
    const diameter = mm / 1000;
    return Math.PI * diameter * diameter / 4;
  }

  function clamp(value, min, max) {
    return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
  }

  function roundedRect(x, y, w, h, r) {
    const radius = Math.min(r, w / 2, h / 2);
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x + radius, y);
    ctx.lineTo(x + w - radius, y);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + radius);
    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - radius);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - radius, y + h);
    ctx.lineTo(x + radius, y + h);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - radius);
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + radius);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + radius, y);
    ctx.closePath();
  }

  function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
    const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
    const head = 10;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = width;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
    ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
    if (label) {
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
      ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 10);
    }
  }

  function compute() {
    const v1 = parseFloat(inputs.v1.value);
    const v2 = parseFloat(inputs.v2.value);
    const v3 = parseFloat(inputs.v3.value);
    const ds = parseFloat(inputs.ds.value);
    const d1 = parseFloat(inputs.d1.value);
    const d2 = parseFloat(inputs.d2.value);
    const d3 = parseFloat(inputs.d3.value);
    const d4 = parseFloat(inputs.d4.value);
    const A1 = areaFromMm(d1);
    const A2 = areaFromMm(d2);
    const A3 = areaFromMm(d3);
    const A4 = areaFromMm(d4);
    const As = Math.PI * ds * ds / 4;
    const Qin = A1 * v1;
    const Qout2 = A2 * v2;
    const Qout3 = A3 * v3;
    const Qout = Qout2 + Qout3;
    const Qnet = Qin - Qout;
    const dhdt = Qnet / Math.max(As, 1e-6);
    const v4 = (As * dhdt) / Math.max(A4, 1e-6);
    const regime = dhdt > 0.0005 ? 'fill' : (dhdt < -0.0005 ? 'drain' : 'steady');
    const fillRatio = clamp(0.46 + dhdt * 4.1, 0.18, 0.84);
    return { v1, v2, v3, ds, d1, d2, d3, d4, A1, A2, A3, A4, As, Qin, Qout2, Qout3, Qout, Qnet, dhdt, v4, regime, fillRatio };
  }

  function syncText(data) {
    labels.v1.textContent = fmt(data.v1, 1) + ' m/s';
    labels.v2.textContent = fmt(data.v2, 1) + ' m/s';
    labels.v3.textContent = fmt(data.v3, 1) + ' m/s';
    labels.ds.textContent = fmt(data.ds, 2) + ' m';
    labels.d1.textContent = fmt(data.d1, 0) + ' mm';
    labels.d2.textContent = fmt(data.d2, 0) + ' mm';
    labels.d3.textContent = fmt(data.d3, 0) + ' mm';
    labels.d4.textContent = fmt(data.d4, 0) + ' mm';

    out.ovQin.textContent = fmt(data.Qin, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovQout.textContent = fmt(data.Qout, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovDhdt.textContent = fmt(data.dhdt, 4) + ' m/s';
    out.ovV4.textContent = fmt(Math.abs(data.v4), 2) + ' m/s';
    out.As.textContent = fmt(data.As, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.A4.textContent = fmt(data.A4, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.Qin.textContent = fmt(data.Qin, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.Qout.textContent = fmt(data.Qout, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.Qnet.textContent = fmt(data.Qnet, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.v4.textContent = fmt(Math.abs(data.v4), 2) + ' m/s';

    const maxFlow = Math.max(data.Qin, data.Qout, Math.abs(data.Qnet), 1e-6);
    out.qinBar.style.width = ((data.Qin / maxFlow) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.qoutBar.style.width = ((data.Qout / maxFlow) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.qnetBar.style.width = ((Math.abs(data.Qnet) / maxFlow) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.qinLabel.textContent = ((data.Qin / maxFlow) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.qoutLabel.textContent = ((data.Qout / maxFlow) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.qnetLabel.textContent = ((Math.abs(data.Qnet) / maxFlow) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

    out.eq1.textContent = 'Q_in = ' + fmt(data.A1, 5) + ' · ' + fmt(data.v1, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.Qin, 4) + ' m^3/s, Q_out = ' + fmt(data.A2, 5) + ' · ' + fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' + ' + fmt(data.A3, 5) + ' · ' + fmt(data.v3, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.Qout, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.eq2.textContent = 'dh/dt = (' + fmt(data.Qin, 4) + ' - ' + fmt(data.Qout, 4) + ') / ' + fmt(data.As, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(data.dhdt, 4) + ' m/s';
    out.eq3.textContent = 'v4 = ' + fmt(data.As, 4) + ' · (' + fmt(data.dhdt, 4) + ') / ' + fmt(data.A4, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(Math.abs(data.v4), 2) + ' m/s';

    if (data.regime === 'fill') {
      out.state.className = 't72-state fill';
      out.state.textContent = 'Spremnik se puni';
      out.expl.textContent = 'Ulazni protok ' + fmt(data.Qin, 4) + ' m^3/s veći je od izlaznog ' + fmt(data.Qout, 4) + ' m^3/s, pa se razina diže brzinom ' + fmt(data.dhdt, 4) + ' m/s. Isti neto volumen mora izaći kao zrak, zato cijev 4 izbacuje zrak brzinom ' + fmt(Math.abs(data.v4), 2) + ' m/s.';
    } else if (data.regime === 'drain') {
      out.state.className = 't72-state drain';
      out.state.textContent = 'Spremnik se prazni';
      out.expl.textContent = 'Izlazni protoci zajedno su veći od ulaza, pa spremnik gubi volumen tekućine i razina pada brzinom ' + fmt(Math.abs(data.dhdt), 4) + ' m/s. Da nadomjesti izgubljeni volumen, zrak ulazi kroz cijev 4 brzinom ' + fmt(Math.abs(data.v4), 2) + ' m/s.';
    } else {
      out.state.className = 't72-state steady';
      out.state.textContent = 'Gotovo stacionarno';
      out.expl.textContent = 'Ulazni i izlazni volumenski tokovi gotovo su izjednačeni, pa je dh/dt vrlo blizu nuli. Razina miruje, a kroz odzračnik nema izraženog toka zraka.';
    }
  }

  function drawScene(data) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
    bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
    bg.addColorStop(1, '#eaf5ff');
    ctx.fillStyle = bg;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const tank = { x: 258, y: 138, w: 202, h: 270 };
    const waterTop = tank.y + tank.h * (1 - data.fillRatio);
    const midY = tank.y + tank.h * 0.46;
    const sideY = tank.y + tank.h * 0.72;
    const ventX = tank.x + tank.w / 2;

    ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
    ctx.fillRect(34, 442, canvas.width - 68, 10);

    roundedRect(54, 66, 122, 122, 24);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.86)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,179,211,.55)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
    ctx.stroke();
    roundedRect(546, 66, 122, 122, 24);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(115, 126, 18 + Math.sqrt(data.As / Math.max(data.As, data.A4)) * 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,.12)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(607, 126, 16 + Math.sqrt(data.A4 / Math.max(data.As, data.A4)) * 52, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(245,158,11,.12)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#f59e0b';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.fillStyle = '#355771';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('A_s', 103, 174);
    ctx.fillText('A4', 594, 174);

    roundedRect(74, midY - 18, tank.x - 74, 36, 18);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#f3f8fd';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#5d7b94';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(tank.x + tank.w - 4, sideY - 18, 128, 36, 18);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(tank.x + tank.w / 2 - 16, tank.y + tank.h - 2, 32, 112, 16);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(ventX - 16, 56, 32, tank.y - 52, 16);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(tank.x, tank.y, tank.w, tank.h, 30);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.68)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#244b74';
    ctx.lineWidth = 4;
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(tank.x + 8, waterTop, tank.w - 16, tank.y + tank.h - waterTop - 8, 24);
    const waterGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, waterTop, 0, tank.y + tank.h);
    waterGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(110,190,255,.86)');
    waterGrad.addColorStop(.55, 'rgba(47,128,237,.92)');
    waterGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(24,90,173,.98)');
    ctx.fillStyle = waterGrad;
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.88)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(tank.x + 18, waterTop + Math.sin(phase) * 2);
    for (let x = tank.x + 18; x <= tank.x + tank.w - 18; x += 8) {
      const y = waterTop + Math.sin(phase + (x - tank.x) * 0.045) * 4;
      ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    }
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.25)';
    for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
      const bubbleX = tank.x + 32 + (i % 4) * 38 + Math.sin(phase + i) * 4;
      const bubbleY = waterTop + 24 + Math.floor(i / 4) * 42 + Math.cos(phase + i) * 4;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(bubbleX, bubbleY, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }

    inletParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.003 + (data.Qin / Math.max(data.Qin, data.Qout, 1e-6)) * 0.008;
      if (particle.t > 1) {
        particle.t = 0;
        particle.lane = Math.random();
      }
      const x = 74 + particle.t * (tank.x - 74);
      const y = midY + (particle.lane - 0.5) * 14;
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.86)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 2.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    bottomParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.003 + (data.Qout2 / Math.max(data.Qin, data.Qout, 1e-6)) * 0.008;
      if (particle.t > 1) particle.t = 0;
      const x = ventX + Math.sin(phase + particle.t * 6) * 4;
      const y = tank.y + tank.h + particle.t * 108;
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.82)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 2.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    sideParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.003 + (data.Qout3 / Math.max(data.Qin, data.Qout, 1e-6)) * 0.008;
      if (particle.t > 1) {
        particle.t = 0;
        particle.lane = Math.random();
      }
```
