```{=html}
      const x = tank.x + tank.w + particle.t * 126;
      const y = sideY + (particle.lane - 0.5) * 14;
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.82)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 2.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    airParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.003 + Math.min(0.018, Math.abs(data.v4) * 0.0008);
      if (particle.t > 1) {
        particle.t = 0;
        particle.lane = Math.random();
      }
      const offsetX = (particle.lane - 0.5) * 10;
      const startY = tank.y - 48;
      const endY = 56;
      const y = data.regime === 'drain'
        ? endY + particle.t * (startY - endY)
        : startY - particle.t * (startY - endY);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.92)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(ventX + offsetX, y, 2.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    roundedRect(236, 82, 244, 34, 17);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.88)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,179,211,.55)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#143b61';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('Q_in - Q_out = promjena volumena u spremniku', 248, 104);

    drawArrow(86, midY - 40, 86 + Math.min(116, 30 + data.Qin * 1800), midY - 40, '#2563eb', 5, 'Q1');
    drawArrow(tank.x + tank.w + 12, sideY - 42, tank.x + tank.w + 12 + Math.min(96, 28 + data.Qout3 * 1800), sideY - 42, '#ef4444', 5, 'Q3');
    drawArrow(ventX + 36, tank.y + tank.h + 74, ventX + 36, tank.y + tank.h + 74 + Math.min(94, 20 + data.Qout2 * 1800), '#f59e0b', 5, 'Q2');
    if (data.regime === 'fill') {
      drawArrow(ventX + 56, tank.y - 16, ventX + 56, 70, '#64748b', 4, 'zrak van');
    } else if (data.regime === 'drain') {
      drawArrow(ventX + 56, 70, ventX + 56, tank.y - 16, '#64748b', 4, 'zrak unutra');
    } else {
      drawArrow(ventX + 56, tank.y - 4, ventX + 56, 78, '#94a3b8', 4, 'zrak ~ 0');
    }

    if (data.regime === 'fill') {
      drawArrow(tank.x - 28, waterTop - 36, tank.x - 28, waterTop - 90, '#f59e0b', 4, 'dh/dt');
    } else if (data.regime === 'drain') {
      drawArrow(tank.x - 28, waterTop - 90, tank.x - 28, waterTop - 36, '#7c3aed', 4, 'dh/dt');
    }

    ctx.fillStyle = '#143b61';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('razina vode', tank.x + 46, waterTop - 16);
    ctx.fillText('A_s = ' + fmt(data.As, 4) + ' m^2', 78, 100);
    ctx.fillText('A4 = ' + fmt(data.A4, 4) + ' m^2', 568, 100);
    ctx.fillText('Uski odzračnik daje veliku brzinu zraka za isti volumen', 138, 446);
  }

  function update() {
    latest = compute();
    syncText(latest);
  }

  function loop() {
    phase += 0.04;
    if (latest) drawScene(latest);
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
    input.addEventListener('input', update);
    input.addEventListener('change', update);
  });

  root.querySelector('#t72-preset-fill').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = '8.3';
    inputs.v2.value = '0.9';
    inputs.v3.value = '3.6';
    inputs.ds.value = '0.61';
    inputs.d1.value = '75';
    inputs.d2.value = '50';
    inputs.d3.value = '60';
    inputs.d4.value = '50';
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#t72-preset-balance').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = '2.7';
    inputs.v2.value = '0.9';
    inputs.v3.value = '3.6';
    inputs.ds.value = '0.61';
    inputs.d1.value = '75';
    inputs.d2.value = '50';
    inputs.d3.value = '60';
    inputs.d4.value = '50';
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#t72-preset-drain').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = '1.8';
    inputs.v2.value = '2.6';
    inputs.v3.value = '5.6';
    inputs.ds.value = '0.61';
    inputs.d1.value = '75';
    inputs.d2.value = '50';
    inputs.d3.value = '60';
    inputs.d4.value = '50';
    update();
  });

  update();
  loop();
})();
</script>
```

**Fizikalno objašnjenje:** Zrak istrujava znatno brže ($12,59 \text{ m/s}$) nego što se razina vode podiže ($0,08 \text{ m/s}$) jer je cijev 4 puno uža od samog spremnika. Da bi se istisnuo isti volumen fluida kroz manji presjek, brzina mora biti veća.

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z73 — U spremnik sa slike ustrujava 10 {.unnumbered}

U spremnik sa slike ustrujava 10,2 kg/s vode, pri čemu istrujava 5,3 kg/s benzina, relativne gustoće 0,69. Ukoliko pretpostavimo da su svi fluidi nestlačivi, potrebno je odrediti volumenski protok zraka i njegov smjer. Zrak je temperature $20^\circ \text{C}$ i tlak je atmosferski – 1bar.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\dot{m}_1$ | $10,2 \text{ kg/s}$ |
| $\dot{m}_2$ | $5,3 \text{ kg/s}$ |
| $\bar{\rho}_b$ | $0,69$ |
| $d_3$ | $0,05 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_v$ | $998 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $\rho_z$ | $1,2 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $T$ | $20^\circ \text{C}$ |
| $p_{atm}$ | $1 \text{ bar}$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- volumenski protok zraka i njegov smjer
- te srednju brzinu ustrujavanja zraka $v_{3sr}$
- *Pretpostavke:** fluid je nestlačiv
- 1.  **Gustoća benzina:** $\rho_b = 998 \cdot 0,69 = 688,6\text{ kg/m}^3$
- 2.  **Volumenski protoci tekućina:**
- Voda (ulaz): $\dot{V}_1 = \frac{\dot{m}_1}{\rho_v} = \frac{10,2}{998} = 0,010214\text{ m}^3\text{/s}$
- Benzin (izlaz): $\dot{V}_2 = \frac{\dot{m}_2}{\rho_b} = \frac{5,3}{688,6} = 0,007698\text{ m}^3\text{/s}$
- 3.  **Bilanca volumena:** Budući da voda ulazi brže nego što benzin izlazi ($\dot{V}_1 > \dot{V}_2$)
- razina tekućine u spremniku raste. To znači da tekućina istiskuje zrak van
- $$\dot{V}_{zrak} = \dot{V}_1 - \dot{V}_2 = 0,010214 - 0,007698 = \mathbf{0,00252\text{ [m}^3\text{/s]}}$$
- 4.  **Brzina zraka na izlazu:**
- $$v_{zsr} = \frac{\dot{V}_3}{A_3} = \frac{0,00252}{\frac{0,05^2 \cdot \pi}{4}} = \mathbf{1,28\text{ [m/s]}}$$

</div>
</div>
<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
  </style>
  <div class="hero">
    <h3>Widget 73: Voda, benzin i zrak u spremniku</h3>
    <p>Ulaz vode i izlaz benzina mijenjaju ukupni volumen tekućih slojeva u spremniku. Razlika tih volumenskih protoka mora se nadoknaditi zrakom kroz cijev 3, pa se smjer zraka automatski mijenja prema predznaku bilance.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="card controls">
      <h4>Maseni tokovi i gustoće</h4>
      <div class="row"><label for="tank73-m1"><span>Maseni tok vode ṁ1</span><span id="tank73-m1-val">10.2 kg/s</span></label><input id="tank73-m1" type="range" min="5" max="20" step="0.1" value="10.2"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="tank73-m2"><span>Maseni tok benzina ṁ2</span><span id="tank73-m2-val">5.3 kg/s</span></label><input id="tank73-m2" type="range" min="2" max="10" step="0.1" value="5.3"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="tank73-rb"><span>Relativna gustoća ρ̄_b</span><span id="tank73-rb-val">0.69</span></label><input id="tank73-rb" type="range" min="0.6" max="0.8" step="0.01" value="0.69"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="tank73-rz"><span>Gustoća zraka ρ_z</span><span id="tank73-rz-val">1.20 kg/m^3</span></label><input id="tank73-rz" type="range" min="1.0" max="1.4" step="0.01" value="1.2"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="tank73-d3"><span>Promjer cijevi 3</span><span id="tank73-d3-val">50 mm</span></label><input id="tank73-d3" type="range" min="30" max="100" step="1" value="50"></div>
      <div class="note">Za nestlačive slojeve vrijedi bilanca volumena: ako u spremnik volumenski ulazi više tekućine nego što izlazi, zrak mora izaći van. Ako je obrnuto, spremnik usisava zrak.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="viz">
      <div class="top">
        <div class="card tank">
          <div class="grid"></div>
          <div class="pipe p1"><div class="track"><div id="tank73-flow1" class="flow in-water"></div></div></div>
          <div class="pipe p2"><div class="track"><div id="tank73-flow2" class="flow out-fuel"></div></div></div>
          <div class="pipe p3"><div class="track"><div id="tank73-flow3" class="flow airflow air-out"></div></div></div>
          <div class="pl l1">1: voda ulazi</div><div class="pl l2">2: benzin izlazi</div><div class="pl l3">3: zrak</div>
          <div class="rim"></div>
          <div class="shell">
            <div id="tank73-air" class="layer airspace"></div>
            <div id="tank73-fuel" class="layer fuel"><div class="particles"></div><div class="surface"></div></div>
            <div id="tank73-water" class="layer water"><div class="particles"></div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card bars">
          <h4>Volumenska bilanca</h4>
          <div class="bh"><span>Ulaz vode V̇1</span><span id="tank73-v1">0.01021 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div class="bt"><div id="tank73-bar-in" class="bf bfi"></div></div>
          <div class="bh"><span>Izlaz benzina V̇2</span><span id="tank73-v2">0.00770 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div class="bt"><div id="tank73-bar-out" class="bf bfo"></div></div>
          <div id="tank73-status" class="pill">V̇1 &gt; V̇2: zrak izlazi iz spremnika</div>
          <div class="box"><strong>Smjer zraka</strong><br><span id="tank73-air-note">Tekućina povećava zauzeti volumen pa spremnik istiskuje zrak kroz cijev 3.</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card metrics">
        <h4>Rezultati u stvarnom vremenu</h4>
        <div class="gridm">
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">V̇_zrak</span><span id="tank73-vair" class="v">0.00252 m^3/s</span><div class="s">Apsolutni volumenski protok zraka</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">v3,zrak</span><span id="tank73-v3air" class="v">1.28 m/s</span><div id="tank73-v3note" class="s">Zrak izlazi</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">ρ_b</span><span id="tank73-rho-b" class="v">688.6 kg/m^3</span><div class="s">Iz relativne gustoće</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">ṁ_zrak</span><span id="tank73-mair" class="v">0.0030 kg/s</span><div class="s">ρ_z · V̇_zrak</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card formula">
        <h4>Bilanca kroz spremnik</h4>
        <div class="box" style="margin-top:0">
          <div class="eq">V̇_zrak = V̇_1 - V̇_2, gdje je V̇_1 = ṁ_1/ρ_v i V̇_2 = ṁ_2/ρ_b</div>
          <div id="tank73-eq-main" style="margin-top:.55rem">V̇_zrak = 0.01021 - 0.00770 = 0.00252 m^3/s</div>
          <div id="tank73-eq-air" style="margin-top:.55rem">v_3 = V̇_zrak / A_3 = 1.28 m/s</div>
          <div class="small">Predznak volumenske bilance određuje samo smjer zraka; u rezultatima se brzina prikazuje po apsolutnoj vrijednosti.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('tank-widget-73-premium');
  if (!root) return;
  const sliders = { m1: root.querySelector('#tank73-m1'), m2: root.querySelector('#tank73-m2'), rb: root.querySelector('#tank73-rb'), rz: root.querySelector('#tank73-rz'), d3: root.querySelector('#tank73-d3') };
  const labels = { m1: root.querySelector('#tank73-m1-val'), m2: root.querySelector('#tank73-m2-val'), rb: root.querySelector('#tank73-rb-val'), rz: root.querySelector('#tank73-rz-val'), d3: root.querySelector('#tank73-d3-val') };
  const el = {
    water: root.querySelector('#tank73-water'), fuel: root.querySelector('#tank73-fuel'), air: root.querySelector('#tank73-air'),
    f1: root.querySelector('#tank73-flow1'), f2: root.querySelector('#tank73-flow2'), f3: root.querySelector('#tank73-flow3'),
    v1: root.querySelector('#tank73-v1'), v2: root.querySelector('#tank73-v2'), barIn: root.querySelector('#tank73-bar-in'), barOut: root.querySelector('#tank73-bar-out'),
    status: root.querySelector('#tank73-status'), airNote: root.querySelector('#tank73-air-note'),
    vair: root.querySelector('#tank73-vair'), v3air: root.querySelector('#tank73-v3air'), v3note: root.querySelector('#tank73-v3note'),
    rhob: root.querySelector('#tank73-rho-b'), mair: root.querySelector('#tank73-mair'), eqMain: root.querySelector('#tank73-eq-main'), eqAir: root.querySelector('#tank73-eq-air')
  };
  function fmt(v,d){return Number(v).toFixed(d);}
  function areaMm(mm){const d=mm/1000;return Math.PI*d*d/4;}
  function strength(node,q,maxq,min){const r=maxq>0?q/maxq:0;const s=Math.max(min,Math.min(1,r));node.style.transform='scale('+s+')';node.style.opacity=String(.25+s*.75);node.style.animationDuration=(Math.max(.35,1.7-s*1.1)).toFixed(2)+'s';}
  function update() {
    const m1=parseFloat(sliders.m1.value),m2=parseFloat(sliders.m2.value),rb=parseFloat(sliders.rb.value),rz=parseFloat(sliders.rz.value),d3=parseFloat(sliders.d3.value);
    const rv=998,rhoB=rv*rb,V1=m1/rv,V2=m2/rhoB,Vair=V1-V2,A3=areaMm(d3),speed=A3>0?Vair/A3:0,mAir=rz*Math.abs(Vair);
    labels.m1.textContent=fmt(m1,1)+' kg/s'; labels.m2.textContent=fmt(m2,1)+' kg/s'; labels.rb.textContent=fmt(rb,2); labels.rz.textContent=fmt(rz,2)+' kg/m^3'; labels.d3.textContent=fmt(d3,0)+' mm';
    el.v1.textContent=fmt(V1,5)+' m^3/s'; el.v2.textContent=fmt(V2,5)+' m^3/s'; el.vair.textContent=fmt(Math.abs(Vair),5)+' m^3/s'; el.v3air.textContent=fmt(Math.abs(speed),2)+' m/s'; el.rhob.textContent=fmt(rhoB,1)+' kg/m^3'; el.mair.textContent=fmt(mAir,4)+' kg/s';
    const ref=Math.max(V1,V2,.0001); el.barIn.style.width=(V1/ref*100).toFixed(1)+'%'; el.barOut.style.width=(V2/ref*100).toFixed(1)+'%';
    const qmax=Math.max(V1,V2,Math.abs(Vair),.0001); strength(el.f1,V1,qmax,.14); strength(el.f2,V2,qmax,.14); strength(el.f3,Math.abs(Vair),qmax,.12);
    const totalLiquid=Math.max(.3,Math.min(.88,.62+(V1-V2)*22));
    const fuelFrac=Math.max(.16,Math.min(.36,0.22+(rb-.69)*0.7));
    const fuelHeight=totalLiquid*fuelFrac*100,waterHeight=(totalLiquid*100)-fuelHeight,airHeight=100-totalLiquid*100;
    el.water.style.height=waterHeight.toFixed(1)+'%';
    el.fuel.style.height=fuelHeight.toFixed(1)+'%';
    el.fuel.style.bottom=waterHeight.toFixed(1)+'%';
    el.air.style.height=airHeight.toFixed(1)+'%';
    if (Vair > 0.00001) { el.status.textContent='V̇1 > V̇2: zrak izlazi iz spremnika'; el.airNote.textContent='Tekućina povećava zauzeti volumen pa spremnik istiskuje zrak kroz cijev 3.'; el.v3note.textContent='Zrak izlazi'; el.f3.classList.remove('air-in'); el.f3.classList.add('air-out'); }
    else if (Vair < -0.00001) { el.status.textContent='V̇2 > V̇1: zrak ulazi u spremnik'; el.airNote.textContent='Volumen tekućih slojeva se smanjuje pa spremnik usisava zrak kroz cijev 3.'; el.v3note.textContent='Zrak ulazi'; el.f3.classList.remove('air-out'); el.f3.classList.add('air-in'); }
    else { el.status.textContent='V̇1 ≈ V̇2: nema izraženog toka zraka'; el.airNote.textContent='Volumenski ulaz i izlaz su gotovo jednaki pa zrak praktički miruje.'; el.v3note.textContent='Zrak gotovo miruje'; el.f3.classList.remove('air-in'); el.f3.classList.add('air-out'); }
    el.eqMain.textContent='V̇_zrak = '+fmt(V1,5)+' - '+fmt(V2,5)+' = '+fmt(Vair,5)+' m^3/s';
    el.eqAir.textContent='v_3 = '+fmt(Math.abs(Vair),5)+' / '+fmt(A3,5)+' = '+fmt(Math.abs(speed),2)+' m/s';
  }
  Object.values(sliders).forEach(s => s.addEventListener('input', update));
  update();
})();
</script>

```

```{=html}
<div id='tank-73-scene' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
  <style>
    #tank-73-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-shell{border:1px solid #e6e0d4;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf8 0%,#f8fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 56px rgba(84,71,49,.1)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(245,158,11,.14),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8ed 0%,#ffffff 58%,#f5fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(84,71,49,.08)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a6a2a;margin-bottom:.35rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.36rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#17324d}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#5d7285;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #f6d7a8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8ed,#ffffff);color:#8a5b12;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #f7dfba;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff7ea,#fdfdff);color:#7a5516;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-stage{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.85rem;padding:.9rem;border-radius:22px;border:1px solid #ece5d8;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#fbf7ef 60%,#eef7ff 100%)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-stage canvas{display:block;flex:1 0 100%;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:18px}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.55rem;flex:1 1 760px;padding:0;border:none;background:transparent;box-shadow:none}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-overlay div{display:grid;gap:.25rem;min-width:0;padding:.78rem .86rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(239,221,190,.96);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(84,71,49,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#4f5f6d}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7f7f7f}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-overlay span{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:800;color:#123a63}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-state{position:static;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;align-self:start;padding:.72rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #ebdcc3;background:rgba(255,251,242,.96);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(84,71,49,.06);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:800}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-state.out{color:#9a4c06;border-color:#f6c28b;background:rgba(255,247,237,.96)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-state.in{color:#7c3aed;border-color:#ddd6fe;background:rgba(250,245,255,.96)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-state.steady{color:#1d4ed8;border-color:#93c5fd;background:rgba(239,246,255,.95)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-card{border:1px solid #e7ebf1;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #f0d7ae;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#fff7ea;color:#8a5b12;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(84,71,49,.08)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#d18d2e}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdfa 0%,#f4f8ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(84,71,49,.08)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#7b8490}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-bars,#tank-73-scene .t73-formula,#tank-73-scene .t73-explainer{padding:1rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-bars strong.section,#tank-73-scene .t73-formula strong.section,#tank-73-scene .t73-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7b8490}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.75rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-v1{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,#2563eb)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-v2{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fbbf24,#d97706)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-vair{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#c084fc,#7c3aed)}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
    #tank-73-scene .t73-explainer{grid-column:1 / -1;border-color:#f7dfba;background:#fff8ed;color:#8a5b12;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
    @media (max-width:980px){
      #tank-73-scene .t73-head,#tank-73-scene .t73-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      #tank-73-scene .t73-chip{justify-self:start}
      #tank-73-scene .t73-overlay{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}
      #tank-73-scene .t73-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
    @media (max-width:640px){
      #tank-73-scene .t73-overlay,#tank-73-scene .t73-presets,#tank-73-scene .t73-metrics{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
  </style>
  <div class='t73-shell'>
    <div class='t73-head'>
      <div>
        <div class='t73-kicker'>Zadatak 73 · voda, benzin i zrak</div>
        <h3 class='t73-title'>Maseni tokovi sami ne govore smjer zraka; prvo ih moraš pretvoriti u volumenske tokove preko gustoća</h3>
        <p class='t73-sub'>Ovdje je ključna razlika između <strong>ṁ</strong> i <strong>V̇</strong>. Voda i benzin imaju različite gustoće, pa tek nakon pretvorbe <strong>V̇ = ṁ / rho</strong> možeš usporediti koliko volumena ulazi, koliko izlazi i treba li spremnik izbacivati ili usisavati zrak.</p>
      </div>
      <div class='t73-chip'>Vdot_air = Vdot_1 - Vdot_2</div>
    </div>

    <div class='t73-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> gornji konverteri najprije pokazuju prijelaz iz mase u volumen za vodu i benzin. Tek ispod, na spremniku, vidiš posljedicu te volumenske bilance: ako je <strong>V̇_1</strong> veći od <strong>V̇_2</strong>, tekućina zauzima više prostora pa zrak mora izaći; ako je manji, zrak mora ući.</div>

    <div class='t73-grid'>
      <div class='t73-stage'>
        <canvas id='t73-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
        <div class='t73-overlay'>
          <div><strong>Vdot_1</strong><span id='t73-ov-v1'>0.01021 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>Vdot_2</strong><span id='t73-ov-v2'>0.00770 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>Vdot_air</strong><span id='t73-ov-vair'>0.00252 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>v3</strong><span id='t73-ov-v3'>1.28 m/s</span></div>
        </div>
        <div id='t73-state' class='t73-state out'>Zrak izlazi</div>
      </div>

      <div class='t73-side'>
        <div class='t73-card t73-controls'>
          <div class='t73-presets'>
            <button type='button' class='t73-preset' id='t73-preset-base'>Početni</button>
            <button type='button' class='t73-preset' id='t73-preset-oil'>Više benzina</button>
            <button type='button' class='t73-preset' id='t73-preset-in'>Ulaz zraka</button>
          </div>

          <div class='t73-row'><label for='t73-m1'><span>Maseni tok vode m1</span><span id='t73-m1-label'>10.2 kg/s</span></label><input id='t73-m1' type='range' min='5' max='20' step='0.1' value='10.2'></div>
          <div class='t73-row'><label for='t73-m2'><span>Maseni tok benzina m2</span><span id='t73-m2-label'>5.3 kg/s</span></label><input id='t73-m2' type='range' min='2' max='10' step='0.1' value='5.3'></div>
          <div class='t73-row'><label for='t73-rb'><span>Relativna gustoća rhō_b</span><span id='t73-rb-label'>0.69</span></label><input id='t73-rb' type='range' min='0.6' max='0.8' step='0.01' value='0.69'></div>
          <div class='t73-row'><label for='t73-rz'><span>Gustoća zraka rho_z</span><span id='t73-rz-label'>1.20 kg/m^3</span></label><input id='t73-rz' type='range' min='1.0' max='1.4' step='0.01' value='1.2'></div>
          <div class='t73-row'><label for='t73-d3'><span>Promjer cijevi 3</span><span id='t73-d3-label'>50 mm</span></label><input id='t73-d3' type='range' min='30' max='100' step='1' value='50'></div>
        </div>

        <div class='t73-card t73-metrics'>
          <div class='t73-metric'><small>rho_b</small><strong id='t73-rhob'>688.6 kg/m^3</strong></div>
          <div class='t73-metric'><small>A3</small><strong id='t73-A3'>0.0020 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='t73-metric'><small>Vdot_1</small><strong id='t73-V1'>0.01021 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='t73-metric'><small>Vdot_2</small><strong id='t73-V2'>0.00770 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='t73-metric'><small>Vdot_air</small><strong id='t73-Vair'>0.00252 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='t73-metric'><small>mdot_air</small><strong id='t73-Mair'>0.0030 kg/s</strong></div>
        </div>

        <div class='t73-card t73-bars'>
          <strong class='section'>Volumenska usporedba</strong>
          <div class='t73-bar-row'><span>Vdot_1</span><strong id='t73-v1-label-bar'>100 %</strong></div>
          <div class='t73-track'><div id='t73-v1-bar' class='t73-fill t73-v1'></div></div>
          <div class='t73-bar-row'><span>Vdot_2</span><strong id='t73-v2-label-bar'>75.4 %</strong></div>
          <div class='t73-track'><div id='t73-v2-bar' class='t73-fill t73-v2'></div></div>
          <div class='t73-bar-row'><span>|Vdot_air|</span><strong id='t73-vair-label-bar'>24.6 %</strong></div>
          <div class='t73-track'><div id='t73-vair-bar' class='t73-fill t73-vair'></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class='t73-card t73-formula'>
          <strong class='section'>Računski lanac</strong>
          <div id='t73-eq1'>rho_b = rho_v · rhō_b</div>
          <div id='t73-eq2'>Vdot_1 = m1 / rho_v, Vdot_2 = m2 / rho_b</div>
          <div id='t73-eq3'>Vdot_air = Vdot_1 - Vdot_2</div>
          <div id='t73-eq4'>v3 = Vdot_air / A3</div>
        </div>

        <div class='t73-card t73-explainer'>
          <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
          <div id='t73-expl'>Nakon pretvorbe mase u volumen vidi se da u spremnik ulazi više volumena nego što ga izlazi, pa zrak mora van.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('tank-73-scene');
  if (!root) return;

  const canvas = root.querySelector('#t73-canvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const inputs = {
    m1: root.querySelector('#t73-m1'),
    m2: root.querySelector('#t73-m2'),
    rb: root.querySelector('#t73-rb'),
    rz: root.querySelector('#t73-rz'),
    d3: root.querySelector('#t73-d3')
  };
  const labels = {
    m1: root.querySelector('#t73-m1-label'),
    m2: root.querySelector('#t73-m2-label'),
    rb: root.querySelector('#t73-rb-label'),
    rz: root.querySelector('#t73-rz-label'),
    d3: root.querySelector('#t73-d3-label')
  };
  const out = {
    ovV1: root.querySelector('#t73-ov-v1'),
    ovV2: root.querySelector('#t73-ov-v2'),
    ovVair: root.querySelector('#t73-ov-vair'),
    ovV3: root.querySelector('#t73-ov-v3'),
    state: root.querySelector('#t73-state'),
    rhob: root.querySelector('#t73-rhob'),
    A3: root.querySelector('#t73-A3'),
    V1: root.querySelector('#t73-V1'),
    V2: root.querySelector('#t73-V2'),
    Vair: root.querySelector('#t73-Vair'),
    Mair: root.querySelector('#t73-Mair'),
    v1Bar: root.querySelector('#t73-v1-bar'),
    v2Bar: root.querySelector('#t73-v2-bar'),
    vairBar: root.querySelector('#t73-vair-bar'),
    v1BarLabel: root.querySelector('#t73-v1-label-bar'),
    v2BarLabel: root.querySelector('#t73-v2-label-bar'),
    vairBarLabel: root.querySelector('#t73-vair-label-bar'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#t73-eq1'),
    eq2: root.querySelector('#t73-eq2'),
    eq3: root.querySelector('#t73-eq3'),
    eq4: root.querySelector('#t73-eq4'),
    expl: root.querySelector('#t73-expl')
  };

  const waterParticles = Array.from({ length: 20 }, function(_, index) {
    return { t: index / 20, lane: Math.random() };
  });
  const fuelParticles = Array.from({ length: 18 }, function() {
    return { t: Math.random(), lane: Math.random() };
  });
  const airParticles = Array.from({ length: 18 }, function() {
    return { t: Math.random(), lane: Math.random() };
  });
  let latest = null;
  let phase = 0;

  function fmt(value, digits) {
    return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
  }

  function areaFromMm(mm) {
    const diameter = mm / 1000;
    return Math.PI * diameter * diameter / 4;
  }

  function clamp(value, min, max) {
    return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
  }

  function roundedRect(x, y, w, h, r) {
    const radius = Math.min(r, w / 2, h / 2);
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x + radius, y);
    ctx.lineTo(x + w - radius, y);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + radius);
    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - radius);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - radius, y + h);
    ctx.lineTo(x + radius, y + h);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - radius);
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + radius);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + radius, y);
    ctx.closePath();
  }

  function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
    const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
    const head = 10;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = width;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
    ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
    if (label) {
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
      ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 10);
    }
  }

  function compute() {
    const m1 = parseFloat(inputs.m1.value);
    const m2 = parseFloat(inputs.m2.value);
    const rb = parseFloat(inputs.rb.value);
    const rz = parseFloat(inputs.rz.value);
    const d3 = parseFloat(inputs.d3.value);
    const rhoV = 998;
    const rhoB = rhoV * rb;
    const V1 = m1 / rhoV;
    const V2 = m2 / rhoB;
    const Vair = V1 - V2;
    const A3 = areaFromMm(d3);
    const v3 = Vair / Math.max(A3, 1e-6);
    const mAir = rz * Math.abs(Vair);
    const regime = Vair > 0.00001 ? 'out' : (Vair < -0.00001 ? 'in' : 'steady');
    const liquidRatio = clamp(0.58 + Vair * 28, 0.34, 0.84);
    const fuelShare = clamp(V2 / Math.max(V1 + V2, 1e-6), 0.16, 0.38);
    return { m1, m2, rb, rz, d3, rhoV, rhoB, V1, V2, Vair, A3, v3, mAir, regime, liquidRatio, fuelShare };
  }

  function syncText(data) {
    labels.m1.textContent = fmt(data.m1, 1) + ' kg/s';
    labels.m2.textContent = fmt(data.m2, 1) + ' kg/s';
    labels.rb.textContent = fmt(data.rb, 2);
    labels.rz.textContent = fmt(data.rz, 2) + ' kg/m^3';
    labels.d3.textContent = fmt(data.d3, 0) + ' mm';

    out.ovV1.textContent = fmt(data.V1, 5) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovV2.textContent = fmt(data.V2, 5) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovVair.textContent = fmt(Math.abs(data.Vair), 5) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovV3.textContent = fmt(Math.abs(data.v3), 2) + ' m/s';
    out.rhob.textContent = fmt(data.rhoB, 1) + ' kg/m^3';
    out.A3.textContent = fmt(data.A3, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.V1.textContent = fmt(data.V1, 5) + ' m^3/s';
    out.V2.textContent = fmt(data.V2, 5) + ' m^3/s';
    out.Vair.textContent = fmt(Math.abs(data.Vair), 5) + ' m^3/s';
    out.Mair.textContent = fmt(data.mAir, 4) + ' kg/s';

    const maxVolume = Math.max(data.V1, data.V2, Math.abs(data.Vair), 1e-6);
    out.v1Bar.style.width = ((data.V1 / maxVolume) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.v2Bar.style.width = ((data.V2 / maxVolume) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.vairBar.style.width = ((Math.abs(data.Vair) / maxVolume) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.v1BarLabel.textContent = ((data.V1 / maxVolume) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.v2BarLabel.textContent = ((data.V2 / maxVolume) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.vairBarLabel.textContent = ((Math.abs(data.Vair) / maxVolume) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

    out.eq1.textContent = 'rho_b = ' + fmt(data.rhoV, 0) + ' · ' + fmt(data.rb, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.rhoB, 1) + ' kg/m^3';
    out.eq2.textContent = 'Vdot_1 = ' + fmt(data.m1, 1) + ' / ' + fmt(data.rhoV, 0) + ' = ' + fmt(data.V1, 5) + ' m^3/s, Vdot_2 = ' + fmt(data.m2, 1) + ' / ' + fmt(data.rhoB, 1) + ' = ' + fmt(data.V2, 5) + ' m^3/s';
    out.eq3.textContent = 'Vdot_air = ' + fmt(data.V1, 5) + ' - ' + fmt(data.V2, 5) + ' = ' + fmt(data.Vair, 5) + ' m^3/s';
    out.eq4.textContent = 'v3 = ' + fmt(Math.abs(data.Vair), 5) + ' / ' + fmt(data.A3, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(Math.abs(data.v3), 2) + ' m/s';

    if (data.regime === 'out') {
      out.state.className = 't73-state out';
      out.state.textContent = 'Zrak izlazi';
      out.expl.textContent = 'Nakon pretvorbe mase u volumen vidi se da je Vdot_1 = ' + fmt(data.V1, 5) + ' m^3/s veći od Vdot_2 = ' + fmt(data.V2, 5) + ' m^3/s. Zato tekućina zauzima više prostora u spremniku i zrak mora izlaziti kroz cijev 3 brzinom ' + fmt(Math.abs(data.v3), 2) + ' m/s.';
    } else if (data.regime === 'in') {
      out.state.className = 't73-state in';
      out.state.textContent = 'Zrak ulazi';
      out.expl.textContent = 'Benzin volumenski izlazi brže nego što voda volumenski ulazi, pa spremnik gubi tekući volumen. Zato mora usisavati zrak kroz cijev 3 brzinom ' + fmt(Math.abs(data.v3), 2) + ' m/s.';
    } else {
      out.state.className = 't73-state steady';
      out.state.textContent = 'Gotovo ravnoteža';
      out.expl.textContent = 'Volumenski ulaz i izlaz gotovo su jednaki, pa spremnik nema izražen neto zahtjev za zrakom i tok u cijevi 3 gotovo miruje.';
    }
  }

  function drawScene(data) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
    bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
    bg.addColorStop(1, '#eef7ff');
    ctx.fillStyle = bg;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const tank = { x: 260, y: 178, w: 200, h: 226 };
    const liquidHeight = tank.h * data.liquidRatio;
    const fuelHeight = liquidHeight * data.fuelShare;
    const waterHeight = liquidHeight - fuelHeight;
    const liquidTop = tank.y + tank.h - liquidHeight;
    const fuelTop = tank.y + tank.h - fuelHeight;
    const ventX = tank.x + tank.w / 2;
    const inletY = tank.y + tank.h - 58;
    const outletY = tank.y + 124;

    function card(x, y, title, value, color) {
      roundedRect(x, y, 168, 74, 20);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.92)';
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(190,204,218,.62)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3;
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.fillStyle = '#6f7f90';
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
      ctx.fillText(title, x + 14, y + 24);
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.font = 'bold 18px Inter';
      ctx.fillText(value, x + 14, y + 52);
    }

    card(42, 68, 'm1 -> Vdot_1', fmt(data.m1, 1) + ' / ' + fmt(data.rhoV, 0), '#2563eb');
    card(276, 68, 'm2 -> Vdot_2', fmt(data.m2, 1) + ' / ' + fmt(data.rhoB, 1), '#d97706');
    card(510, 68, 'Vdot_air', fmt(data.Vair, 5), data.regime === 'in' ? '#7c3aed' : '#8a5b12');

    roundedRect(tank.x + tank.w - 2, inletY - 18, 138, 36, 18);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#f6f9fd';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#5d7b94';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(84, outletY - 18, tank.x - 84, 36, 18);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(ventX - 16, 68, 32, tank.y - 68, 16);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(tank.x, tank.y, tank.w, tank.h, 30);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.68)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#3f5f7e';
    ctx.lineWidth = 4;
    ctx.stroke();

    roundedRect(tank.x + 8, tank.y + tank.h - waterHeight - 8, tank.w - 16, waterHeight, 22);
    const waterGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, tank.y, 0, tank.y + tank.h);
    waterGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(110,190,255,.88)');
    waterGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(24,90,173,.98)');
    ctx.fillStyle = waterGrad;
    ctx.fill();

    roundedRect(tank.x + 8, fuelTop - 8, tank.w - 16, fuelHeight + 8, 18);
    const fuelGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, fuelTop, 0, tank.y + tank.h);
    fuelGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(248,206,96,.95)');
    fuelGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(214,147,35,.96)');
    ctx.fillStyle = fuelGrad;
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.88)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(tank.x + 18, liquidTop + Math.sin(phase) * 2);
    for (let x = tank.x + 18; x <= tank.x + tank.w - 18; x += 8) {
      const y = liquidTop + Math.sin(phase + (x - tank.x) * 0.05) * 3;
      ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    }
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.24)';
    for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
      const x = tank.x + 34 + (i % 5) * 26 + Math.sin(phase + i) * 4;
      const y = tank.y + tank.h - 26 - Math.floor(i / 5) * 42 + Math.cos(phase + i) * 4;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 4.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }

    waterParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.003 + (data.V1 / Math.max(data.V1, data.V2, 1e-6)) * 0.009;
      if (particle.t > 1) {
        particle.t = 0;
        particle.lane = Math.random();
      }
      const x = tank.x + tank.w + particle.t * 134;
      const y = inletY + (particle.lane - 0.5) * 13;
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.86)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 2.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    fuelParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.003 + (data.V2 / Math.max(data.V1, data.V2, 1e-6)) * 0.009;
      if (particle.t > 1) {
        particle.t = 0;
        particle.lane = Math.random();
      }
      const x = 84 + particle.t * (tank.x - 84);
      const y = outletY + (particle.lane - 0.5) * 13;
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.86)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 2.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    airParticles.forEach(function(particle) {
      particle.t += 0.003 + Math.min(0.018, Math.abs(data.v3) * 0.002);
      if (particle.t > 1) {
        particle.t = 0;
        particle.lane = Math.random();
      }
      const offsetX = (particle.lane - 0.5) * 10;
      const startY = tank.y - 46;
      const endY = 68;
      const y = data.regime === 'in'
        ? endY + particle.t * (startY - endY)
        : startY - particle.t * (startY - endY);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.92)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(ventX + offsetX, y, 2.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });

    roundedRect(202, 154, 318, 34, 17);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.88)';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,179,211,.55)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#17324d';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('Masa -> volumen -> smjer zraka', 302, 176);

    drawArrow(tank.x + tank.w + 18, inletY - 38, tank.x + tank.w + 104, inletY - 38, '#2563eb', 5, 'V1');
    drawArrow(94, outletY - 38, 94 + Math.min(94, 26 + data.V2 * 6000), outletY - 38, '#d97706', 5, 'V2');
    if (data.regime === 'out') {
      drawArrow(ventX + 52, tank.y - 10, ventX + 52, 82, '#8a5b12', 4, 'zrak van');
    } else if (data.regime === 'in') {
      drawArrow(ventX + 52, 82, ventX + 52, tank.y - 10, '#7c3aed', 4, 'zrak unutra');
    } else {
      drawArrow(ventX + 52, tank.y - 6, ventX + 52, 88, '#94a3b8', 4, 'zrak ~ 0');
    }

    ctx.fillStyle = '#17324d';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('voda ulazi', tank.x + tank.w + 18, inletY + 30);
    ctx.fillText('benzin izlazi', 86, outletY + 32);
    ctx.fillText('rho_b = ' + fmt(data.rhoB, 1) + ' kg/m^3', 286, 444);
    ctx.fillText('Razlika volumena određuje zrak, ne sama razlika masa.', 180, 468);
  }

  function update() {
    latest = compute();
    syncText(latest);
  }

  function loop() {
    phase += 0.04;
    if (latest) drawScene(latest);
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
    input.addEventListener('input', update);
    input.addEventListener('change', update);
  });

  root.querySelector('#t73-preset-base').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.m1.value = '10.2';
    inputs.m2.value = '5.3';
    inputs.rb.value = '0.69';
    inputs.rz.value = '1.2';
    inputs.d3.value = '50';
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#t73-preset-oil').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.m1.value = '10.2';
    inputs.m2.value = '7.4';
    inputs.rb.value = '0.62';
    inputs.rz.value = '1.2';
    inputs.d3.value = '50';
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#t73-preset-in').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.m1.value = '7.0';
    inputs.m2.value = '8.8';
    inputs.rb.value = '0.60';
    inputs.rz.value = '1.2';
    inputs.d3.value = '50';
    update();
  });

  update();
  loop();
})();
</script>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z74 — Ispitne stjenke zračnog tunela izrađene su od perforiranog materijala {.unnumbered}

Ispitne stjenke zračnog tunela izrađene su od perforiranog materijala, pri čemu se fluid isisava u svrhu generiranja tankog viskoznog sloja. Stjenka ima 800 provrta promjera 7 mm po kvadratnom metru površine. Brzina istrujavanja na svakom provrtu iznosi $v_p = 10 \text{ m/s}$ , pri čemu brzina na ulazu iznosi $v_1 = 46 \text{ m/s}$. Ukoliko pretpostavimo da je fluid (zrak) nestlačiv temperature $20^\circ \text{C}$ i tlaka 1 atm, potrebno je odrediti ukupne odsisne brzine $v_2$, te $v_f$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $v_p$ | $10 \text{ m/s}$ |
| $v_1$ | $46 \text{ m/s}$ |
| $n_p$ | $800 \text{ m}^{-2}$ |
| $d_p$ | $0,007 \text{ m}$ |
| $D_f$ | $2,4 \text{ m}$ |
| $D_1$ | $D_2 = 0,9 \text{ m}$ |
| $D_0$ | $2,6 \text{ m}$ |
| $L$ | $4 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_z$ | $1,2 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $T$ | $20^\circ \text{C}$ |
| $p_{atm}$ | $1 \text{ atm}$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- odsisni volumenski protok $v_2$ i $v_f$
- *Pretpostavke:** fluid je nestlačiv

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1.  **Ulazna brzina $v_0$:** Iz kontinuiteta između sekcije 0 i 1:
    $$v_0 = \frac{D_1^2}{D_0^2} \cdot v_1 = \frac{0,9^2}{2,6^2} \cdot 46 = 5,512\text{ m/s}$$
2.  **Protok kroz jedan provrt ($\dot{V}_p$):**
    $$\dot{V}_p = A_p \cdot v_p = \frac{0,007^2 \cdot \pi}{4} \cdot 10 = 0,000385\text{ m}^3\text{/s}$$
3.  **Ukupni broj provrta ($N_p$):** Površina stjenke je plašt valjka $P = D_1 \cdot \pi \cdot L$.
    $$N_p = n_p \cdot (D_1 \cdot \pi \cdot L) = 800 \cdot (0,9 \cdot \pi \cdot 4) \approx 9048$$
4.  **Ukupni odsisni protok ($\dot{V}_L$):**
    $$\dot{V}_L = N_p \cdot \dot{V}_p = 9048 \cdot 0,000385 = 3,482\text{ m}^3\text{/s}$$
5.  **Brzina na presjeku 2 ($v_2$):** Protok u 2 je ono što ostane nakon odsisa: $\dot{V}_2 = \dot{V}_1 - \dot{V}_L$.
    $$\dot{V}_1 = \frac{D_1^2 \pi}{4} \cdot v_1 = \frac{0,9^2 \cdot \pi}{4} \cdot 46 = 29,26\text{ m}^3\text{/s}$$
    $$\dot{V}_2 = 29,26 - 3,482 = 25,78\text{ m}^3\text{/s} \implies v_2 = \frac{\dot{V}_2}{A_2} = \mathbf{40,53\text{ [m/s]}}$$
6.  **Brzina ventilatora ($v_f$):** $v_f = \frac{D_2^2}{D_f^2} \cdot v_2 = \frac{0,9^2}{2,4^2} \cdot 40,53 = \mathbf{5,7\text{ [m/s]}}$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="wind-tunnel-74-premium" style="display:none;font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:1100px;margin:2rem auto;border:1px solid rgba(46,125,50,.14);border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#f7fff8);box-shadow:0 22px 54px rgba(37,88,43,.12);color:#17324d;">
  <style>
    #wind-tunnel-74-premium *{box-sizing:border-box}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .hero{padding:1.3rem 1.5rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(111,207,151,.22),transparent 35%),linear-gradient(135deg,#effcf3 0%,#fff 52%,#f4fffb 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(46,125,50,.12)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .hero h3{margin:0 0 .35rem;font-size:1.25rem;color:#22653d}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .hero p{margin:0;color:#637f74;line-height:1.55;font-size:.95rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem;padding:1rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .card{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(62,101,137,.1);border-radius:18px;box-shadow:0 12px 26px rgba(57,79,102,.08)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.9rem;align-content:start;order:2}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .controls h4,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .viz h4{margin:0;font-size:.82rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b8296}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.3rem;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#294764}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .row input{width:100%;accent-color:#27ae60}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .note{padding:.85rem .95rem;border-radius:14px;background:rgba(39,174,96,.08);border:1px solid rgba(39,174,96,.12);font-size:.88rem;color:#507260;line-height:1.55}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .viz{display:contents;order:1}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .stage{padding:1rem;position:relative;min-height:430px;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fffb,#f9fcff);order:1}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metrics{order:3}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .formula{order:4}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(86,116,143,.07) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(86,116,143,.07) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:28px 28px;opacity:.4}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .diagram{position:relative;height:250px;margin-top:1.2rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .sec,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .fan{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f9fcff,#dde9f6);border:3px solid #466989;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,.32)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .fan{left:3%;width:11%;border-radius:22px}
    #wind-tunnel-74-premium .fan::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:10px;border-radius:50%;background:repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg,#dceef8 0 20deg,#7fc8a9 20deg 40deg)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .diff{left:14%;width:16%;clip-path:polygon(0 34%,100% 12%,100% 88%,0 66%)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .test{left:30%;width:36%;border-radius:16px;border-style:dashed;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfffc,#effcf3)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .cont{left:66%;width:16%;clip-path:polygon(0 12%,100% 34%,100% 66%,0 88%)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .out{left:82%;width:12%;border-radius:20px}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .flow-main{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;border-radius:inherit}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .main-stream{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 18% 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.82) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 0 50%/34px 100% repeat-x,linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(111,207,151,.08),rgba(39,174,96,.72),rgba(111,207,151,.08));animation:mf174left 1.15s linear infinite;opacity:.94;transition:transform .35s ease,opacity .35s ease}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .holes{position:absolute;left:30%;width:36%;top:24%;height:52%;pointer-events:none}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .hole{position:absolute;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#76c893;border:1px solid rgba(34,101,61,.32)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .suction{position:absolute;width:12px;height:38px;border-radius:999px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%,rgba(255,255,255,.86) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 50% 0/100% 26px repeat-y,linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(111,207,151,.06),rgba(39,174,96,.58),rgba(111,207,151,.06));animation:mf174up 1s linear infinite;transform-origin:center bottom;opacity:.9;transition:transform .35s ease,opacity .35s ease}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s1,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s2,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s3,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s4,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s5,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s6{top:12%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s7,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s8,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s9,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s10,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s11,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s12{bottom:12%;animation-name:mf174down;transform-origin:center top}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .bl{position:absolute;left:30%;width:36%;top:28%;height:44%;pointer-events:none;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(39,174,96,.16),transparent 20%,transparent 80%,rgba(39,174,96,.16));border-radius:14px;opacity:.55;transition:opacity .35s ease}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .labels span{position:absolute;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;color:#385873;background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.12);border-radius:999px;padding:.25rem .5rem;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(34,66,98,.08)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .l0{left:6%;top:8%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .l1{left:37%;top:8%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .l2{left:69%;top:8%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .lf{left:16%;bottom:8%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metrics,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .formula{padding:1rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metrics h4,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .formula h4{margin:0 0 .9rem;font-size:.98rem;color:#1a4266}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .gridm{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.85rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metric{padding:.85rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fafdff,#eef7ff);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.1)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metric .k{display:block;font-size:.77rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#67829c;margin-bottom:.35rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metric .v{font-size:1.06rem;font-weight:800;color:#10395e;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metric .s{margin-top:.25rem;font-size:.78rem;color:#64819b}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .box{padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.76);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.12);line-height:1.65;color:#355771}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .eq{font-family:"Cambria Math","STIX Two Math",serif;font-size:1.02rem;color:#143d62}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .small{font-size:.84rem;color:#64819b;margin-top:.55rem}@keyframes mf174left{from{background-position:0 50%,0 0}to{background-position:-34px 50%,0 0}}@keyframes mf174up{from{background-position:50% 0,0 0}to{background-position:50% -26px,0 0}}@keyframes mf174down{from{background-position:50% 0,0 0}to{background-position:50% 26px,0 0}}@media (max-width:980px){#wind-tunnel-74-premium .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .gridm{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}@media (max-width:640px){#wind-tunnel-74-premium .gridm{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  </style>
  <div class="hero">
    <h3>Widget 74: Aerotunel s perforiranom stjenkom</h3>
    <p>U ispitnoj sekciji dio struje izlazi kroz perforiranu stjenku. Što je veći odsis kroz rupice, to je manji protok koji ostaje u glavnom kanalu, pa opada brzina na presjeku 2 i mijenja se potrebna brzina u zoni ventilatora.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="card controls">
      <div class="note"><strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Svaka perforacija odnosi mali dio glavnog toka. Kad se ti mali odsisni tokovi zbroje preko cijele sekcije, brzina u glavnom kanalu mora pasti jer nakon perforacija ostaje manji volumenski protok.</div>
      <h4>Parametri odsisa</h4>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-v1"><span>Ulazna brzina v1</span><span id="wt74-v1-val">46.0 m/s</span></label><input id="wt74-v1" type="range" min="20" max="60" step="1" value="46"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-vp"><span>Brzina u provrtu v_p</span><span id="wt74-vp-val">10.0 m/s</span></label><input id="wt74-vp" type="range" min="5" max="20" step="0.5" value="10"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-np"><span>Broj provrta n_p</span><span id="wt74-np-val">800 1/m^2</span></label><input id="wt74-np" type="range" min="400" max="1200" step="20" value="800"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-dp"><span>Promjer provrta d_p</span><span id="wt74-dp-val">7.0 mm</span></label><input id="wt74-dp" type="range" min="3" max="12" step="0.1" value="7"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-l"><span>Duljina sekcije L</span><span id="wt74-l-val">4.0 m</span></label><input id="wt74-l" type="range" min="2" max="6" step="0.1" value="4"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-d1"><span>Promjer D1 = D2</span><span id="wt74-d1-val">0.90 m</span></label><input id="wt74-d1" type="range" min="0.6" max="1.2" step="0.01" value="0.9"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-df"><span>Promjer ventilatora D_f</span><span id="wt74-df-val">2.40 m</span></label><input id="wt74-df" type="range" min="1.6" max="3.2" step="0.01" value="2.4"></div>
      <div class="note">Glavni tok putuje kroz tunel, a kroz perforacije se odvaja dio volumena. Ostatak protoka određuje brzinu u sekciji 2, dok kontinuitet između presjeka 2 i ventilatora daje brzinu <span class="eq">v_f</span>.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="viz">
      <div class="card stage">
        <div class="grid"></div>
        <div class="labels"><span class="l0">v1</span><span class="l1">ispitna sekcija</span><span class="l2">v2</span><span class="lf">v_f</span></div>
        <div class="diagram">
          <div class="fan" id="wt74-fan"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main1" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div class="sec diff" id="wt74-diff"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main2" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div class="sec test" id="wt74-test"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main3" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div class="sec cont" id="wt74-cont"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main4" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div class="sec out" id="wt74-out"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main5" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div id="wt74-bl" class="bl"></div>
          <div class="holes" id="wt74-holes">
            <div class="hole" style="left:8%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:24%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:40%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:56%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:72%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:88%;top:18%"></div>
            <div class="hole" style="left:8%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:24%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:40%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:56%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:72%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:88%;bottom:18%"></div>
            <div class="suction s1" style="left:7%"></div><div class="suction s2" style="left:23%"></div><div class="suction s3" style="left:39%"></div><div class="suction s4" style="left:55%"></div><div class="suction s5" style="left:71%"></div><div class="suction s6" style="left:87%"></div>
            <div class="suction s7" style="left:7%"></div><div class="suction s8" style="left:23%"></div><div class="suction s9" style="left:39%"></div><div class="suction s10" style="left:55%"></div><div class="suction s11" style="left:71%"></div><div class="suction s12" style="left:87%"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card metrics">
        <h4>Rezultati u stvarnom vremenu</h4>
        <div class="gridm">
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">N_p</span><span id="wt74-Np" class="v">9048</span><div class="s">Ukupni broj provrta</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A_suction</span><span id="wt74-As" class="v">0.3482 m^2</span><div class="s">Ukupna perforirana površina</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">V̇_suction</span><span id="wt74-Vs" class="v">3.482 m^3/s</span><div class="s">Odsisani protok</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">v2</span><span id="wt74-v2" class="v">40.53 m/s</span><div class="s">Brzina nakon odsisa</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">v_f</span><span id="wt74-vf" class="v">5.70 m/s</span><div class="s">Brzina kod ventilatora</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card formula">
        <h4>Bilanca kroz tunel</h4>
        <div class="box">
          <div class="eq">V̇_suction = n_p · (π d_p^2 / 4) · (π D_1 L) · v_p</div>
          <div id="wt74-eq1" style="margin-top:.55rem">V̇_suction = 3.482 m^3/s</div>
          <div id="wt74-eq2" style="margin-top:.55rem">v_2 = (V̇_1 - V̇_suction) / A_1 = 40.53 m/s</div>
          <div id="wt74-eq3" style="margin-top:.55rem">v_f = (D_1^2 / D_f^2) · v_2 = 5.70 m/s</div>
          <div class="small">Kako odsis raste, sve je tanji granični sloj uz perforiranu stijenu i manji je protok koji ostaje u glavnoj struji.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('wind-tunnel-74-premium');
  if (!root) return;
  const sliders = { v1: root.querySelector('#wt74-v1'), vp: root.querySelector('#wt74-vp'), np: root.querySelector('#wt74-np'), dp: root.querySelector('#wt74-dp'), l: root.querySelector('#wt74-l'), d1: root.querySelector('#wt74-d1'), df: root.querySelector('#wt74-df') };
  const labels = { v1: root.querySelector('#wt74-v1-val'), vp: root.querySelector('#wt74-vp-val'), np: root.querySelector('#wt74-np-val'), dp: root.querySelector('#wt74-dp-val'), l: root.querySelector('#wt74-l-val'), d1: root.querySelector('#wt74-d1-val'), df: root.querySelector('#wt74-df-val') };
  const el = {
    main: [root.querySelector('#wt74-main1'), root.querySelector('#wt74-main2'), root.querySelector('#wt74-main3'), root.querySelector('#wt74-main4'), root.querySelector('#wt74-main5')],
    suctions: Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.suction')), bl: root.querySelector('#wt74-bl'),
    Np: root.querySelector('#wt74-Np'), As: root.querySelector('#wt74-As'), Vs: root.querySelector('#wt74-Vs'), v2: root.querySelector('#wt74-v2'), vf: root.querySelector('#wt74-vf'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#wt74-eq1'), eq2: root.querySelector('#wt74-eq2'), eq3: root.querySelector('#wt74-eq3')
  };
  function fmt(v,d){return Number(v).toFixed(d);}
  function area(d){return Math.PI*d*d/4;}
  function strength(node,q,maxq,min){const r=maxq>0?q/maxq:0;const s=Math.max(min,Math.min(1,r));node.style.transform='scale('+s+')';node.style.opacity=String(.22+s*.76);node.style.animationDuration=(Math.max(.35,1.7-s*1.1)).toFixed(2)+'s';}
  function update() {
    const v1=parseFloat(sliders.v1.value),vp=parseFloat(sliders.vp.value),np=parseFloat(sliders.np.value),dp=parseFloat(sliders.dp.value)/1000,L=parseFloat(sliders.l.value),D1=parseFloat(sliders.d1.value),Df=parseFloat(sliders.df.value),D0=2.6;
    labels.v1.textContent=fmt(v1,1)+' m/s'; labels.vp.textContent=fmt(vp,1)+' m/s'; labels.np.textContent=fmt(np,0)+' 1/m^2'; labels.dp.textContent=fmt(dp*1000,1)+' mm'; labels.l.textContent=fmt(L,1)+' m'; labels.d1.textContent=fmt(D1,2)+' m'; labels.df.textContent=fmt(Df,2)+' m';
    const A1=area(D1),Ap=area(dp),wallArea=Math.PI*D1*L,Np=np*wallArea,Asuction=Np*Ap,Vs=Asuction*vp,V1=A1*v1,V2=Math.max(0,V1-Vs),v2=V2/A1,vf=(D1*D1/(Df*Df))*v2,v0=(D1*D1/(D0*D0))*v1;
    el.Np.textContent=Math.round(Np).toString(); el.As.textContent=fmt(Asuction,4)+' m^2'; el.Vs.textContent=fmt(Vs,3)+' m^3/s'; el.v2.textContent=fmt(v2,2)+' m/s'; el.vf.textContent=fmt(vf,2)+' m/s';
    el.eq1.textContent='V̇_suction = '+fmt(np,0)+'·(π·'+fmt(dp,4)+'^2/4)·(π·'+fmt(D1,2)+'·'+fmt(L,1)+')·'+fmt(vp,1)+' = '+fmt(Vs,3)+' m^3/s';
    el.eq2.textContent='v_2 = ('+fmt(V1,3)+' - '+fmt(Vs,3)+') / '+fmt(A1,3)+' = '+fmt(v2,2)+' m/s';
    el.eq3.textContent='v_f = ('+fmt(D1,2)+'^2 / '+fmt(Df,2)+'^2) · '+fmt(v2,2)+' = '+fmt(vf,2)+' m/s';
    const qmax=Math.max(V1,V2,Vs,.0001); strength(el.main[0],V1,qmax,.35); strength(el.main[1],V1,qmax,.35); strength(el.main[2],V2,qmax,.24); strength(el.main[3],V2,qmax,.24); strength(el.main[4],V2,qmax,.24);
    el.suctions.forEach(function(s){ strength(s,Vs/12,qmax,.18); });
    el.bl.style.opacity=String(Math.max(.18,Math.min(.72,Vs/6.5)));
    root.querySelector('.l0').textContent='v0 = '+fmt(v0,2)+' m/s';
    root.querySelector('.l2').textContent='v2 = '+fmt(v2,2)+' m/s';
    root.querySelector('.lf').textContent='v_f = '+fmt(vf,2)+' m/s';
  }
  Object.values(sliders).forEach(s => s.addEventListener('input', update));
  update();
})();
</script>

```

```{=html}
<div id='wind-tunnel-74-scene' data-mf1-ux-ready='1' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
  <style>
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-shell{border:1px solid #d6eadb;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f6fff9 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 58px rgba(22,101,52,.08)}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.4rem 1.5rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(52,211,153,.18),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#f3fff6 0%,#ffffff 58%,#f7fffb 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(22,101,52,.1)}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5f7e68;margin-bottom:.35rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.4rem,2.5vw,1.9rem);line-height:1.08;color:#12351f}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:70ch;color:#496458;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-chip{align-self:start;padding:.75rem .95rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #bde1c9;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eafff1,#f9fffb);color:#166534;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-note{margin:1rem 1.5rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #cfe9d8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#effcf3,#f9fffb);color:#24543a;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem 1.5rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-stage{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.85rem;padding:.9rem;border-radius:22px;border:1px solid #dbeadf;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#eef9f1 66%,#e4f4e9 100%)}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-stage canvas{display:block;flex:1 0 100%;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:18px}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.55rem;flex:1 1 760px;padding:0;border:none;background:transparent;box-shadow:none}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-overlay div{display:grid;gap:.25rem;min-width:0;padding:.78rem .86rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(189,225,201,.95);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(22,101,52,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#385146}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5c7f68}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-overlay span{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:800;color:#12351f}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-card{border:1px solid #e3ebf0;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #bde1c9;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#effcf3;color:#166534;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(22,101,52,.08)}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#365147}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#16a34a}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfffc 0%,#eef9f1 100%);border:1px solid rgba(22,101,52,.08)}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#5f7e68}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#12351f;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-bars,#wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-formula,#wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-explainer{padding:1rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-bars strong.section,#wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-formula strong.section,#wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5f7e68}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#365147;font-weight:700}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf5ef;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.85rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-main{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#22c55e,#16a34a)}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-suction{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#86efac,#14b8a6)}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
    #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-explainer{grid-column:1 / -1;border-color:#fdba74;background:#fff7ed;color:#7c2d12;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
    @media (max-width:980px){
      #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-head,#wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-chip{justify-self:start}
      #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-overlay{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}
      #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
    @media (max-width:640px){
      #wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-overlay,#wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-presets,#wind-tunnel-74-scene .wt74b-metrics{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
  </style>
  <div class='wt74b-shell'>
    <div class='wt74b-head'>
      <div>
        <div class='wt74b-kicker'>Z74 perforirana ispitna sekcija</div>
        <h3 class='wt74b-title'>Svaki provrt odnosi mali dio toka, ali njihov zbroj određuje koliko brzine ostaje u glavnom kanalu</h3>
        <p class='wt74b-sub'>Najprije iz <strong>n<sub>p</sub></strong>, <strong>d<sub>p</sub></strong> i <strong>L</strong> dobivaš ukupnu perforiranu površinu. Tek nakon toga vidiš koliki je odsisani protok <strong>V̇<sub>s</sub></strong>, što ostaje u testnoj sekciji i kolika je brzina ventilatora.</p>
      </div>
      <div class='wt74b-chip'>V̇<sub>2</sub> = V̇<sub>1</sub> - V̇<sub>s</sub></div>
    </div>

    <div class='wt74b-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> kad povećavaš broj rupica, njihov promjer ili brzinu kroz provrt, ukupan odsis raste. To odmah smanjuje preostali tok u glavnom kanalu, pa pada <strong>v<sub>2</sub></strong>. Budući da ventilator radi na još većem presjeku, njegova brzina <strong>v<sub>f</sub></strong> pada dodatno.</div>

    <div class='wt74b-grid'>
      <div class='wt74b-stage'>
        <canvas id='wt74b-canvas' width='680' height='520'></canvas>
        <div class='wt74b-overlay'>
          <div><strong>V̇<sub>1</sub></strong><span id='wt74b-ov-v1'>29.26 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>V̇<sub>s</sub></strong><span id='wt74b-ov-vs'>3.48 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>v<sub>2</sub></strong><span id='wt74b-ov-v2'>40.53 m/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>v<sub>f</sub></strong><span id='wt74b-ov-vf'>5.70 m/s</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class='wt74b-side'>
        <div class='wt74b-card wt74b-controls'>
          <div class='wt74b-presets'>
            <button type='button' class='wt74b-preset' id='wt74b-preset-base'>Početni</button>
            <button type='button' class='wt74b-preset' id='wt74b-preset-strong'>Jak odsis</button>
            <button type='button' class='wt74b-preset' id='wt74b-preset-mild'>Slab odsis</button>
          </div>

          <div class='wt74b-row'><label for='wt74b-v1'><span>Ulazna brzina v1</span><span id='wt74b-v1-label'>46.0 m/s</span></label><input id='wt74b-v1' type='range' min='20' max='60' step='1' value='46'></div>
          <div class='wt74b-row'><label for='wt74b-vp'><span>Brzina u provrtu v_p</span><span id='wt74b-vp-label'>10.0 m/s</span></label><input id='wt74b-vp' type='range' min='5' max='20' step='0.5' value='10'></div>
          <div class='wt74b-row'><label for='wt74b-np'><span>Broj provrta n_p</span><span id='wt74b-np-label'>800 1/m^2</span></label><input id='wt74b-np' type='range' min='400' max='1200' step='20' value='800'></div>
          <div class='wt74b-row'><label for='wt74b-dp'><span>Promjer provrta d_p</span><span id='wt74b-dp-label'>7.0 mm</span></label><input id='wt74b-dp' type='range' min='3' max='12' step='0.1' value='7'></div>
          <div class='wt74b-row'><label for='wt74b-l'><span>Duljina sekcije L</span><span id='wt74b-l-label'>4.0 m</span></label><input id='wt74b-l' type='range' min='2' max='6' step='0.1' value='4'></div>
          <div class='wt74b-row'><label for='wt74b-d1'><span>Promjer D1 = D2</span><span id='wt74b-d1-label'>0.90 m</span></label><input id='wt74b-d1' type='range' min='0.6' max='1.2' step='0.01' value='0.9'></div>
          <div class='wt74b-row'><label for='wt74b-df'><span>Promjer ventilatora D_f</span><span id='wt74b-df-label'>2.40 m</span></label><input id='wt74b-df' type='range' min='1.6' max='3.2' step='0.01' value='2.4'></div>
        </div>

        <div class='wt74b-card wt74b-metrics'>
          <div class='wt74b-metric'><small>N_p</small><strong id='wt74b-Np'>9048</strong></div>
          <div class='wt74b-metric'><small>A_hole</small><strong id='wt74b-Ahole'>0.000038 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='wt74b-metric'><small>A_suction</small><strong id='wt74b-As'>0.3482 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='wt74b-metric'><small>V̇_suction</small><strong id='wt74b-Vs'>3.482 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='wt74b-metric'><small>v2</small><strong id='wt74b-v2'>40.53 m/s</strong></div>
          <div class='wt74b-metric'><small>v_f</small><strong id='wt74b-vf'>5.70 m/s</strong></div>
        </div>

        <div class='wt74b-card wt74b-bars'>
          <strong class='section'>Raspodjela toka</strong>
          <div class='wt74b-bar-row'><span>Ostaje u glavnom kanalu</span><strong id='wt74b-main-label'>88.1 %</strong></div>
          <div class='wt74b-track'><div id='wt74b-main-bar' class='wt74b-fill wt74b-main'></div></div>
          <div class='wt74b-bar-row'><span>Odlazi kroz provrte</span><strong id='wt74b-suction-label'>11.9 %</strong></div>
          <div class='wt74b-track'><div id='wt74b-suction-bar' class='wt74b-fill wt74b-suction'></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class='wt74b-card wt74b-formula'>
          <strong class='section'>Lanac kontinuiteta</strong>
          <div id='wt74b-eq1'>N_p = n_p · (π D_1 L), A_s = N_p · (π d_p^2 / 4)</div>
          <div id='wt74b-eq2'>V̇_s = A_s · v_p, V̇_2 = V̇_1 - V̇_s</div>
          <div id='wt74b-eq3'>v_2 = V̇_2 / A_1, v_f = V̇_2 / A_f</div>
        </div>

        <div class='wt74b-card wt74b-explainer'>
          <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
          <div id='wt74b-expl'>Ukupni odsis je dovoljno malen da većina toka ostaje u kanalu, ali ipak dovoljno velik da brzina iza perforacija primjetno padne.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('wind-tunnel-74-scene');
  if (!root) return;

  const canvas = root.querySelector('#wt74b-canvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const inputs = {
    v1: root.querySelector('#wt74b-v1'),
    vp: root.querySelector('#wt74b-vp'),
    np: root.querySelector('#wt74b-np'),
    dp: root.querySelector('#wt74b-dp'),
    l: root.querySelector('#wt74b-l'),
    d1: root.querySelector('#wt74b-d1'),
    df: root.querySelector('#wt74b-df')
  };
  const labels = {
    v1: root.querySelector('#wt74b-v1-label'),
    vp: root.querySelector('#wt74b-vp-label'),
    np: root.querySelector('#wt74b-np-label'),
    dp: root.querySelector('#wt74b-dp-label'),
    l: root.querySelector('#wt74b-l-label'),
    d1: root.querySelector('#wt74b-d1-label'),
    df: root.querySelector('#wt74b-df-label')
  };
  const out = {
    Np: root.querySelector('#wt74b-Np'),
    Ahole: root.querySelector('#wt74b-Ahole'),
    As: root.querySelector('#wt74b-As'),
    Vs: root.querySelector('#wt74b-Vs'),
    v2: root.querySelector('#wt74b-v2'),
    vf: root.querySelector('#wt74b-vf'),
    ovV1: root.querySelector('#wt74b-ov-v1'),
    ovVs: root.querySelector('#wt74b-ov-vs'),
    ovV2: root.querySelector('#wt74b-ov-v2'),
    ovVf: root.querySelector('#wt74b-ov-vf'),
    mainBar: root.querySelector('#wt74b-main-bar'),
    suctionBar: root.querySelector('#wt74b-suction-bar'),
    mainLabel: root.querySelector('#wt74b-main-label'),
    suctionLabel: root.querySelector('#wt74b-suction-label'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#wt74b-eq1'),
    eq2: root.querySelector('#wt74b-eq2'),
    eq3: root.querySelector('#wt74b-eq3'),
    expl: root.querySelector('#wt74b-expl')
  };

  let phase = 0;
  let latest = null;

  function fmt(value, digits) {
    return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
  }

  function area(diameterMeters) {
    return Math.PI * diameterMeters * diameterMeters / 4;
  }

  function compute() {
    const v1 = parseFloat(inputs.v1.value);
    const vp = parseFloat(inputs.vp.value);
    const np = parseFloat(inputs.np.value);
    const dp = parseFloat(inputs.dp.value) / 1000;
    const L = parseFloat(inputs.l.value);
    const D1 = parseFloat(inputs.d1.value);
    const Df = parseFloat(inputs.df.value);

    const A1 = area(D1);
    const Af = area(Df);
    const Ahole = area(dp);
    const wallArea = Math.PI * D1 * L;
    const Np = np * wallArea;
    const Asuction = Np * Ahole;
    const V1 = A1 * v1;
    const VsRaw = Asuction * vp;
    const Vs = Math.min(VsRaw, V1);
    const V2 = Math.max(0, V1 - Vs);
    const v2 = V2 / A1;
    const vf = V2 / Af;
    const suctionShare = V1 > 0 ? Vs / V1 : 0;
    const mainShare = V1 > 0 ? V2 / V1 : 0;

    return { v1, vp, np, dp, L, D1, Df, A1, Af, Ahole, Np, Asuction, V1, VsRaw, Vs, V2, v2, vf, suctionShare, mainShare };
  }

  function syncText(data) {
    labels.v1.textContent = fmt(data.v1, 1) + ' m/s';
    labels.vp.textContent = fmt(data.vp, 1) + ' m/s';
    labels.np.textContent = fmt(data.np, 0) + ' 1/m^2';
    labels.dp.textContent = fmt(data.dp * 1000, 1) + ' mm';
    labels.l.textContent = fmt(data.L, 1) + ' m';
    labels.d1.textContent = fmt(data.D1, 2) + ' m';
    labels.df.textContent = fmt(data.Df, 2) + ' m';

    out.Np.textContent = Math.round(data.Np).toString();
    out.Ahole.textContent = fmt(data.Ahole, 6) + ' m^2';
    out.As.textContent = fmt(data.Asuction, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.Vs.textContent = fmt(data.Vs, 3) + ' m^3/s';
    out.v2.textContent = fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s';
    out.vf.textContent = fmt(data.vf, 2) + ' m/s';

    out.ovV1.textContent = fmt(data.V1, 2) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovVs.textContent = fmt(data.Vs, 2) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovV2.textContent = fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s';
    out.ovVf.textContent = fmt(data.vf, 2) + ' m/s';

    out.mainBar.style.width = (data.mainShare * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.suctionBar.style.width = (data.suctionShare * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.mainLabel.textContent = (data.mainShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.suctionLabel.textContent = (data.suctionShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

    out.eq1.textContent = 'N_p = ' + fmt(data.np, 0) + ' · (π · ' + fmt(data.D1, 2) + ' · ' + fmt(data.L, 1) + ') = ' + Math.round(data.Np) + ', A_s = ' + fmt(data.Np, 0) + ' · ' + fmt(data.Ahole, 6) + ' = ' + fmt(data.Asuction, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.eq2.textContent = 'V̇_s = ' + fmt(data.Asuction, 4) + ' · ' + fmt(data.vp, 1) + ' = ' + fmt(data.Vs, 3) + ' m^3/s, pa je V̇_2 = ' + fmt(data.V1, 3) + ' - ' + fmt(data.Vs, 3) + ' = ' + fmt(data.V2, 3) + ' m^3/s';
    out.eq3.textContent = 'v_2 = ' + fmt(data.V2, 3) + ' / ' + fmt(data.A1, 3) + ' = ' + fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s, v_f = ' + fmt(data.V2, 3) + ' / ' + fmt(data.Af, 3) + ' = ' + fmt(data.vf, 2) + ' m/s';

    if (data.VsRaw > data.V1) {
      out.expl.textContent = 'Zadani odsis premašuje dostupni ulazni protok, pa model reže V̇_s na V̇_1. To je granični slučaj u kojem perforacije praktički pojedu cijeli glavni tok.';
    } else {
      out.expl.textContent = 'Ukupni odsis iznosi ' + fmt(data.Vs, 3) + ' m^3/s, pa iza perforirane sekcije ostaje ' + fmt(data.V2, 3) + ' m^3/s. Zato brzina pada s ' + fmt(data.v1, 1) + ' m/s na ' + fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s, a na većem presjeku ventilatora dodatno pada na ' + fmt(data.vf, 2) + ' m/s.';
    }
  }

  function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width) {
    const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
    const head = 10;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = width;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
    ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
  }

  function draw(data) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
    bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
    bg.addColorStop(1, '#e8f8ed');
    ctx.fillStyle = bg;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const centerY = 286;
    const testHeight = 92 + data.D1 * 40;
    const fanHeight = 120 + data.Df * 34;
    const inletX = 44;
    const contractX = 168;
    const testX = 228;
    const testW = 188;
    const fanX = 506;
    const endX = 632;

    function top(height) { return centerY - height / 2; }
    function bottom(height) { return centerY + height / 2; }

    ctx.fillStyle = '#d8efe0';
    ctx.fillRect(24, 412, canvas.width - 48, 10);

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,.16)';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(inletX, top(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(contractX, top(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(testX, top(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(testX + testW, top(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(fanX, top(fanHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(endX, top(fanHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(endX, bottom(fanHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(fanX, bottom(fanHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(testX + testW, bottom(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(testX, bottom(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(contractX, bottom(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(inletX, bottom(testHeight));
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();

    const flow = ctx.createLinearGradient(inletX, 0, endX, 0);
    flow.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(34,197,94,.16)');
    flow.addColorStop(.5, 'rgba(34,197,94,.34)');
```
