    flow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(16,185,129,.16)');
    ctx.fillStyle = flow;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(inletX + 6, top(testHeight) + 8);
    ctx.lineTo(endX - 8, top(fanHeight) + 10);
    ctx.lineTo(endX - 8, bottom(fanHeight) - 10);
    ctx.lineTo(inletX + 6, bottom(testHeight) - 8);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();

    const boundary = Math.min(18 + data.suctionShare * 28, testHeight * .28);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(22,163,74,.12)';
    ctx.fillRect(testX, top(testHeight), testW, boundary);
    ctx.fillRect(testX, bottom(testHeight) - boundary, testW, boundary);

    ctx.strokeStyle = '#355c48';
    ctx.lineWidth = 4;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(inletX, top(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(contractX, top(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(testX + testW, top(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(fanX, top(fanHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(endX, top(fanHeight));
    ctx.moveTo(inletX, bottom(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(contractX, bottom(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(testX + testW, bottom(testHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(fanX, bottom(fanHeight));
    ctx.lineTo(endX, bottom(fanHeight));
    ctx.stroke();

    for (let i = 0; i < 24; i++) {
      const ratio = ((i / 24) + phase * (.008 + data.mainShare * .01)) % 1;
      const x = inletX + ratio * (endX - inletX - 16);
      const localHeight = x < fanX ? testHeight : fanHeight;
      const y = top(localHeight) + 18 + (i % 6) * ((localHeight - 36) / 5);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.82)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }

    const suctionLength = 18 + data.suctionShare * 64;
    for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
      const x = testX + 18 + i * (testW - 36) / 6;
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4ade80';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, top(testHeight), 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.arc(x, bottom(testHeight), 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
      drawArrow(x, top(testHeight) - 2, x, top(testHeight) - suctionLength, '#10b981', 2.4);
      drawArrow(x, bottom(testHeight) + 2, x, bottom(testHeight) + suctionLength, '#10b981', 2.4);
    }

    const fanCenterX = 566;
    const fanCenterY = centerY;
    const fanRadius = 42;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(fanCenterX, fanCenterY, fanRadius + 8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#456b58';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(fanCenterX, fanCenterY, fanRadius + 8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(fanCenterX, fanCenterY);
    ctx.rotate(phase * .08 + data.vf * .03);
    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
      ctx.rotate(Math.PI / 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = '#7dd3a7';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(26, 8, 36, 0);
      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(26, -8, 0, 0);
      ctx.fill();
    }
    ctx.restore();

    ctx.fillStyle = '#12351f';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('ulaz v1', 62, top(testHeight) - 16);
    ctx.fillText('ispitna sekcija', testX + 34, top(testHeight) - 16);
    ctx.fillText('ventilator', fanCenterX - 26, centerY + fanRadius + 30);
    ctx.fillText('v2 = ' + fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s', testX + testW + 18, centerY - 18);
    ctx.fillText('v_f = ' + fmt(data.vf, 2) + ' m/s', fanCenterX - 30, centerY - fanRadius - 18);
  }

  function update() {
    latest = compute();
    syncText(latest);
  }

  function loop() {
    phase += 1;
    if (latest) draw(latest);
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
    input.addEventListener('input', update);
  });

  root.querySelector('#wt74b-preset-base').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = 46;
    inputs.vp.value = 10;
    inputs.np.value = 800;
    inputs.dp.value = 7;
    inputs.l.value = 4;
    inputs.d1.value = 0.9;
    inputs.df.value = 2.4;
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#wt74b-preset-strong').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = 46;
    inputs.vp.value = 16;
    inputs.np.value = 1040;
    inputs.dp.value = 9;
    inputs.l.value = 5;
    inputs.d1.value = 0.9;
    inputs.df.value = 2.4;
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#wt74b-preset-mild').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = 46;
    inputs.vp.value = 6;
    inputs.np.value = 520;
    inputs.dp.value = 5;
    inputs.l.value = 3;
    inputs.d1.value = 0.9;
    inputs.df.value = 2.4;
    update();
  });

  update();
  loop();
})();
</script>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z75 — Pumpa ubrizgava vodu {.unnumbered}

Pumpa ubrizgava vodu, prikazano na slici, brzinom $v_1 = 26 \text{ m/s}$ kroz cijev promjera 100 mm, oko koje struji voda brzinom 2,6 m/s . Dva toka se nizstrujno miješaju, pri čemu u presjeku 3 brzina $v_3$ postaje konstantnom. Ukoliko je tok stacionaran i nestlačiv, potrebno je odrediti brzinu $v_3$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $v_1$ | $26 \text{ m/s}$ |
| $v_2$ | $2,6 \text{ m/s}$ |
| $D_1$ | $100 \text{ mm}$ |
| $D_2$ | $300 \text{ mm}$ |
| $\rho_v$ | $998 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- brzinu u cijevi na presjeku 3 $v_3$
- *Pretpostavke:** fluid je nestlačiv
- tok je stacionaran

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1.  **Fizikalni model:** Imamo dva ulazna toka. Prvi je kroz unutarnju cijev ($A_1$), a drugi kroz prstenasti prostor između cijevi 1 i vanjske cijevi 2 ($A_2 - A_1$). Na kraju se spajaju u cijev promjera $D_2$ (presjek 3).
2.  **Jednadžba bilance protoka:**
    $$\dot{V}_1 + \dot{V}_2 = \dot{V}_3$$
    $$A_1 \cdot v_1 + (A_2 - A_1) \cdot v_2 = A_3 \cdot v_3$$
    Budući da je $A_3 = A_2$ (vanjski promjer cijevi u kojoj se miješaju), uvrštavamo formule:
    $$\frac{D_1^2 \pi}{4} \cdot v_1 + \frac{(D_2^2 - D_1^2) \pi}{4} \cdot v_2 = \frac{D_2^2 \pi}{4} \cdot v_3$$
3.  **Izračun brzine $v_3$:**
    Poništavamo $\pi/4$ i izoliramo $v_3$:
    $$v_3 = \frac{D_1^2 \cdot v_1 + (D_2^2 - D_1^2) \cdot v_2}{D_2^2}$$
    $$v_3 = \frac{0,1^2 \cdot 26 + (0,3^2 - 0,1^2) \cdot 2,6}{0,3^2} = \frac{0,26 + 0,08 \cdot 2,6}{0,09} = \frac{0,468}{0,09} = \mathbf{5,2\text{ [m/s]}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

0,0 0}to{background-position:34px 50%,34px 24%,34px 76%}}@keyframes mf175spin{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}@media (max-width:980px){#coaxial-widget-75-premium (max-width:640px){#coaxial-widget-75-premium .gridm{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  </style>
  <div class="hero">
    <h3>Widget 75: Koaksijalno miješanje dvaju tokova</h3>
    <p>Brži središnji mlaz i sporiji prstenasti tok nizvodno se miješaju u jedinstveni profil brzine. Kontinuitet određuje konačnu uniformnu brzinu <span class="eq">v_3</span> na izlazu.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="card controls">
      <div class="note"><strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Brzi središnji mlaz nosi velik impuls, ali zauzima samo dio presjeka. Nakon miješanja taj se protok raspodijeli na cijeli izlazni presjek pa je konačna brzina <span class="eq">v_3</span> znatno manja od početne brzine mlaza.</div>
      <h4>Ulazni parametri</h4>
      <div class="row"><label for="cx75-v1"><span>Brzina mlaza v1</span><span id="cx75-v1-val">26.0 m/s</span></label><input id="cx75-v1" type="range" min="10" max="40" step="0.5" value="26"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="cx75-v2"><span>Brzina okruženja v2</span><span id="cx75-v2-val">2.6 m/s</span></label><input id="cx75-v2" type="range" min="1" max="10" step="0.1" value="2.6"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="cx75-d1"><span>Promjer unutarnje cijevi D1</span><span id="cx75-d1-val">100 mm</span></label><input id="cx75-d1" type="range" min="50" max="150" step="1" value="100"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="cx75-d2"><span>Vanjski promjer D2</span><span id="cx75-d2-val">300 mm</span></label><input id="cx75-d2" type="range" min="150" max="400" step="1" value="300"></div>
      <div class="note">Ulazni profil ima dva režima: brzi centar i sporiji prsten. Nizvodno turbulencija izjednačava brzinu, pa izlaz prelazi u gotovo ravni profil s jedinstvenom vrijednošću <span class="eq">v_3</span>.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="viz">
      <div class="card stage">
        <div class="grid"></div>
        <div class="zones">
          <div class="zone">
            <h5>Ulaz</h5>
            <div class="pipe">
              <div class="annulus"></div>
              <div id="cx75-core-in" class="core"></div>
              <div class="flow flow-ann" id="cx75-flow-ann-in"></div>
              <div class="flow flow-core" id="cx75-flow-core-in"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="zone">
            <h5>Zona miješanja</h5>
            <div class="mixbox">
              <div class="eddy e1"></div><div class="eddy e2"></div><div class="eddy e3"></div>
              <div class="mixstream" id="cx75-mixstream"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="zone">
            <h5>Potpuno izmiješano</h5>
            <div class="pipe">
              <div id="cx75-core-out" class="mixstream" style="left:10%;right:10%;height:54px;"></div>
              <div class="flow flow-core" id="cx75-flow-out"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card metrics">
        <h4>Rezultati u stvarnom vremenu</h4>
        <div class="gridm">
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A1</span><span id="cx75-A1" class="v">0.0079 m^2</span><div class="s">Površina mlaza</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A_ann</span><span id="cx75-Aann" class="v">0.0628 m^2</span><div class="s">Prstenasti presjek</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A2</span><span id="cx75-A2" class="v">0.0707 m^2</span><div class="s">Ukupni izlazni presjek</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">v3</span><span id="cx75-v3" class="v">5.20 m/s</span><div class="s">Uniformna brzina izlaza</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A1/A2</span><span id="cx75-ratio" class="v">0.111</span><div class="s">Omjer središnjeg mlaza</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card profile">
        <div class="profile-card">
          <h4>Profil brzine na ulazu</h4>
          <div class="profile-bars">
            <div id="cx75-bar-v2a" class="bar ann">v2</div>
            <div id="cx75-bar-v1" class="bar">v1</div>
            <div id="cx75-bar-v2b" class="bar ann">v2</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="profile-card">
          <h4>Profil brzine na izlazu</h4>
          <div class="profile-bars">
            <div id="cx75-bar-v3a" class="bar">v3</div>
            <div id="cx75-bar-v3b" class="bar">v3</div>
            <div id="cx75-bar-v3c" class="bar">v3</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card formula">
        <h4>Kontinuitet za miješanje</h4>
        <div class="box">
          <div class="eq">v_3 = (A_1 v_1 + A_ann v_2) / A_2, gdje je A_ann = π/4 · (D_2^2 - D_1^2)</div>
          <div id="cx75-eq1" style="margin-top:.55rem">v_3 = (0.0079·26.0 + 0.0628·2.6) / 0.0707 = 5.20 m/s</div>
          <div id="cx75-eq2" style="margin-top:.55rem">V̇_1 + V̇_2 = V̇_3</div>
          <div class="small">Ako središnji mlaz zauzima mali udio presjeka, njegov veliki impuls se razblažuje na velikom izlaznom presjeku, pa je konačna brzina daleko bliže sporijem prstenastom toku nego ulaznom mlazu.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('coaxial-widget-75-premium');
  if (!root) return;
  const sliders = { v1: root.querySelector('#cx75-v1'), v2: root.querySelector('#cx75-v2'), d1: root.querySelector('#cx75-d1'), d2: root.querySelector('#cx75-d2') };
  const labels = { v1: root.querySelector('#cx75-v1-val'), v2: root.querySelector('#cx75-v2-val'), d1: root.querySelector('#cx75-d1-val'), d2: root.querySelector('#cx75-d2-val') };
  const el = {
    coreIn: root.querySelector('#cx75-core-in'), coreOut: root.querySelector('#cx75-core-out'), mixstream: root.querySelector('#cx75-mixstream'),
    flowCoreIn: root.querySelector('#cx75-flow-core-in'), flowAnnIn: root.querySelector('#cx75-flow-ann-in'), flowOut: root.querySelector('#cx75-flow-out'),
    A1: root.querySelector('#cx75-A1'), Aann: root.querySelector('#cx75-Aann'), A2: root.querySelector('#cx75-A2'), v3: root.querySelector('#cx75-v3'), ratio: root.querySelector('#cx75-ratio'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#cx75-eq1'), eq2: root.querySelector('#cx75-eq2'),
    bars: { v1: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v1'), v2a: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v2a'), v2b: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v2b'), v3a: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v3a'), v3b: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v3b'), v3c: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v3c') }
  };
  function fmt(v,d){return Number(v).toFixed(d);}
  function areaMm(mm){const d=mm/1000;return Math.PI*d*d/4;}
  function flowStrength(node,q,maxq,min){const r=maxq>0?q/maxq:0;const s=Math.max(min,Math.min(1,r));node.style.transform='scale('+s+')';node.style.opacity=String(.24+s*.76);node.style.animationDuration=(Math.max(.35,1.7-s*1.1)).toFixed(2)+'s';}
  function barHeight(node,val,maxVal,label){const h=Math.max(18,Math.min(120,120*val/maxVal));node.style.height=h.toFixed(1)+'px';node.textContent=label;}
  function update() {
    let v1=parseFloat(sliders.v1.value),v2=parseFloat(sliders.v2.value),d1=parseFloat(sliders.d1.value),d2=parseFloat(sliders.d2.value);
    if (d2 <= d1) { d2 = d1 + 10; sliders.d2.value = d2; }
    labels.v1.textContent=fmt(v1,1)+' m/s'; labels.v2.textContent=fmt(v2,1)+' m/s'; labels.d1.textContent=fmt(d1,0)+' mm'; labels.d2.textContent=fmt(d2,0)+' mm';
    const A1=areaMm(d1),A2=areaMm(d2),Aann=A2-A1,v3=(A1*v1 + Aann*v2)/A2,Q1=A1*v1,Q2=Aann*v2,Q3=A2*v3;
    el.A1.textContent=fmt(A1,4)+' m^2'; el.Aann.textContent=fmt(Aann,4)+' m^2'; el.A2.textContent=fmt(A2,4)+' m^2'; el.v3.textContent=fmt(v3,2)+' m/s'; el.ratio.textContent=fmt(A1/A2,3);
    el.eq1.textContent='v_3 = ('+fmt(A1,4)+'·'+fmt(v1,1)+' + '+fmt(Aann,4)+'·'+fmt(v2,1)+') / '+fmt(A2,4)+' = '+fmt(v3,2)+' m/s';
    el.eq2.textContent='V̇_1 + V̇_2 = '+fmt(Q1,4)+' + '+fmt(Q2,4)+' = '+fmt(Q3,4)+' m^3/s';
    const innerHeight=Math.max(18,Math.min(62,(d1/d2)*84)); el.coreIn.style.height=innerHeight.toFixed(1)+'px';
    el.mixstream.style.height=(44 + Math.min(20,v3*1.6)).toFixed(1)+'px'; el.coreOut.style.height=(44 + Math.min(20,v3*1.6)).toFixed(1)+'px';
    const qmax=Math.max(Q1,Q2,Q3,.0001); flowStrength(el.flowCoreIn,Q1,qmax,.22); flowStrength(el.flowAnnIn,Q2,qmax,.22); flowStrength(el.flowOut,Q3,qmax,.24);
    const vmax=Math.max(v1,v2,v3,1); barHeight(el.bars.v1,v1,vmax,'v1'); barHeight(el.bars.v2a,v2,vmax,'v2'); barHeight(el.bars.v2b,v2,vmax,'v2'); barHeight(el.bars.v3a,v3,vmax,'v3'); barHeight(el.bars.v3b,v3,vmax,'v3'); barHeight(el.bars.v3c,v3,vmax,'v3');
  }
  Object.values(sliders).forEach(s => s.addEventListener('input', update));
  update();
})();
</script>

```

```{=html}
<div id='coaxial-widget-75-scene' data-mf1-ux-ready='1' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
  <style>
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-shell{border:1px solid #dce8f4;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f6fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 58px rgba(41,76,109,.1)}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(14,165,233,.14),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#ffffff 56%,#f4fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.1)}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5d7b94;margin-bottom:.35rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.38rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#163c61}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#547088;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f8ff,#fbfdff);color:#1d4f78;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #d7e8f8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff7ff,#f8fbff);color:#2d587f;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-stage{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.85rem;padding:.9rem;border-radius:22px;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#eef6ff 68%,#e7f2fb 100%)}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-stage canvas{display:block;flex:1 0 100%;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:18px}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.55rem;flex:1 1 760px;padding:0;border:none;background:transparent;box-shadow:none}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-overlay div{display:grid;gap:.25rem;min-width:0;padding:.78rem .86rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(207,227,247,.98);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#3a5671}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-overlay span{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:800;color:#123a63}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-card{border:1px solid #e3ebf2;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#eff7ff;color:#1d4f78;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfdff 0%,#eef7ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.08)}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#6a849a}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-bars,#coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-formula,#coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-explainer{padding:1rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-bars strong.section,#coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-formula strong.section,#coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.85rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-jet{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#2f80ed,#1f5fb6)}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-annulus{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8fe7ff,#56ccf2)}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
    #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-explainer{grid-column:1 / -1;border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
    @media (max-width:980px){
      #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-head,#coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-chip{justify-self:start}
      #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-overlay{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}
      #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
    @media (max-width:640px){
      #coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-overlay,#coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-presets,#coaxial-widget-75-scene .cx75b-metrics{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
  </style>
  <div class='cx75b-shell'>
    <div class='cx75b-head'>
      <div>
        <div class='cx75b-kicker'>Z75 koaksijalno miješanje</div>
        <h3 class='cx75b-title'>Dva ulazna toka nose različite volumenske doprinose, a izlazna brzina je njihov zajednički rezultat na većem presjeku</h3>
        <p class='cx75b-sub'>Ovdje nije dovoljno gledati samo brzine <strong>v<sub>1</sub></strong> i <strong>v<sub>2</sub></strong>. Najprije iz promjera dobivaš presjeke <strong>A<sub>1</sub></strong> i <strong>A<sub>ann</sub></strong>, zatim tokove <strong>V̇<sub>1</sub></strong> i <strong>V̇<sub>2</sub></strong>, a tek njihov zbroj na izlaznom presjeku <strong>A<sub>2</sub></strong> određuje uniformnu brzinu <strong>v<sub>3</sub></strong>.</p>
      </div>
      <div class='cx75b-chip'>V̇<sub>3</sub> = V̇<sub>1</sub> + V̇<sub>2</sub></div>
    </div>

    <div class='cx75b-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> tamniji središnji mlaz nosi veliki lokalni protok kroz mali presjek, dok svjetliji prsten nosi sporiji tok preko većeg prstena. U zoni miješanja ta se dva doprinosa zbrajaju i na izlazu prelaze u jedan ravni profil brzine.</div>

    <div class='cx75b-grid'>
      <div class='cx75b-stage'>
        <canvas id='cx75b-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
        <div class='cx75b-overlay'>
          <div><strong>V̇<sub>1</sub></strong><span id='cx75b-ov-q1'>0.2042 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>V̇<sub>2</sub></strong><span id='cx75b-ov-q2'>0.1634 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>V̇<sub>3</sub></strong><span id='cx75b-ov-q3'>0.3676 m^3/s</span></div>
          <div><strong>v<sub>3</sub></strong><span id='cx75b-ov-v3'>5.20 m/s</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class='cx75b-side'>
        <div class='cx75b-card cx75b-controls'>
          <div class='cx75b-presets'>
            <button type='button' class='cx75b-preset' id='cx75b-preset-base'>Početni</button>
            <button type='button' class='cx75b-preset' id='cx75b-preset-jet'>Jak mlaz</button>
            <button type='button' class='cx75b-preset' id='cx75b-preset-ann'>Jači prsten</button>
          </div>

          <div class='cx75b-row'><label for='cx75b-v1'><span>Brzina mlaza v1</span><span id='cx75b-v1-label'>26.0 m/s</span></label><input id='cx75b-v1' type='range' min='10' max='40' step='0.5' value='26'></div>
          <div class='cx75b-row'><label for='cx75b-v2'><span>Brzina prstena v2</span><span id='cx75b-v2-label'>2.6 m/s</span></label><input id='cx75b-v2' type='range' min='1' max='10' step='0.1' value='2.6'></div>
          <div class='cx75b-row'><label for='cx75b-d1'><span>Promjer unutarnje cijevi D1</span><span id='cx75b-d1-label'>100 mm</span></label><input id='cx75b-d1' type='range' min='50' max='150' step='1' value='100'></div>
          <div class='cx75b-row'><label for='cx75b-d2'><span>Vanjski promjer D2</span><span id='cx75b-d2-label'>300 mm</span></label><input id='cx75b-d2' type='range' min='150' max='400' step='1' value='300'></div>
        </div>

        <div class='cx75b-card cx75b-metrics'>
          <div class='cx75b-metric'><small>A1</small><strong id='cx75b-A1'>0.0079 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='cx75b-metric'><small>Aann</small><strong id='cx75b-Aann'>0.0628 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='cx75b-metric'><small>A2</small><strong id='cx75b-A2'>0.0707 m^2</strong></div>
          <div class='cx75b-metric'><small>V̇1</small><strong id='cx75b-Q1'>0.2042 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='cx75b-metric'><small>V̇2</small><strong id='cx75b-Q2'>0.1634 m^3/s</strong></div>
          <div class='cx75b-metric'><small>v3</small><strong id='cx75b-v3'>5.20 m/s</strong></div>
        </div>

        <div class='cx75b-card cx75b-bars'>
          <strong class='section'>Tko više puni izlaz?</strong>
          <div class='cx75b-bar-row'><span>Središnji mlaz</span><strong id='cx75b-jet-label'>55.5 %</strong></div>
          <div class='cx75b-track'><div id='cx75b-jet-bar' class='cx75b-fill cx75b-jet'></div></div>
          <div class='cx75b-bar-row'><span>Prstenasti tok</span><strong id='cx75b-ann-label'>44.5 %</strong></div>
          <div class='cx75b-track'><div id='cx75b-ann-bar' class='cx75b-fill cx75b-annulus'></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class='cx75b-card cx75b-formula'>
          <strong class='section'>Lanac kontinuiteta</strong>
          <div id='cx75b-eq1'>A_1 i A_ann određuju koliki se volumenski tok može nositi za zadane v1 i v2.</div>
          <div id='cx75b-eq2'>V̇_3 = V̇_1 + V̇_2</div>
          <div id='cx75b-eq3'>v_3 = V̇_3 / A_2</div>
        </div>

        <div class='cx75b-card cx75b-explainer'>
          <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
          <div id='cx75b-expl'>Brzi središnji mlaz puni izlaz više od sporijeg prstena, ali se na većem presjeku njegova velika lokalna brzina razvodni pa je v3 bitno manja od v1.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('coaxial-widget-75-scene');
  if (!root) return;

  const canvas = root.querySelector('#cx75b-canvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const inputs = {
    v1: root.querySelector('#cx75b-v1'),
    v2: root.querySelector('#cx75b-v2'),
    d1: root.querySelector('#cx75b-d1'),
    d2: root.querySelector('#cx75b-d2')
  };
  const labels = {
    v1: root.querySelector('#cx75b-v1-label'),
    v2: root.querySelector('#cx75b-v2-label'),
    d1: root.querySelector('#cx75b-d1-label'),
    d2: root.querySelector('#cx75b-d2-label')
  };
  const out = {
    A1: root.querySelector('#cx75b-A1'),
    Aann: root.querySelector('#cx75b-Aann'),
    A2: root.querySelector('#cx75b-A2'),
    Q1: root.querySelector('#cx75b-Q1'),
    Q2: root.querySelector('#cx75b-Q2'),
    v3: root.querySelector('#cx75b-v3'),
    ovQ1: root.querySelector('#cx75b-ov-q1'),
    ovQ2: root.querySelector('#cx75b-ov-q2'),
    ovQ3: root.querySelector('#cx75b-ov-q3'),
    ovV3: root.querySelector('#cx75b-ov-v3'),
    jetBar: root.querySelector('#cx75b-jet-bar'),
    annBar: root.querySelector('#cx75b-ann-bar'),
    jetLabel: root.querySelector('#cx75b-jet-label'),
    annLabel: root.querySelector('#cx75b-ann-label'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#cx75b-eq1'),
    eq2: root.querySelector('#cx75b-eq2'),
    eq3: root.querySelector('#cx75b-eq3'),
    expl: root.querySelector('#cx75b-expl')
  };

  let phase = 0;
  let latest = null;

  function fmt(value, digits) {
    return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
  }

  function areaFromMm(mm) {
    const diameter = mm / 1000;
    return Math.PI * diameter * diameter / 4;
  }

  function mixColor(weight) {
    const inner = { r: 47, g: 128, b: 237 };
    const outer = { r: 86, g: 204, b: 242 };
    const r = Math.round(inner.r * weight + outer.r * (1 - weight));
    const g = Math.round(inner.g * weight + outer.g * (1 - weight));
    const b = Math.round(inner.b * weight + outer.b * (1 - weight));
    return 'rgb(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ')';
  }

  function roundedRect(x, y, w, h, r) {
    const radius = Math.min(r, w / 2, h / 2);
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x + radius, y);
    ctx.lineTo(x + w - radius, y);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + radius);
    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - radius);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - radius, y + h);
    ctx.lineTo(x + radius, y + h);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - radius);
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + radius);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + radius, y);
    ctx.closePath();
  }

  function compute() {
    const v1 = parseFloat(inputs.v1.value);
    const v2 = parseFloat(inputs.v2.value);
    const d1 = parseFloat(inputs.d1.value);
    let d2 = parseFloat(inputs.d2.value);
    if (d2 <= d1) {
      d2 = d1 + 10;
      inputs.d2.value = d2;
    }

    const A1 = areaFromMm(d1);
    const A2 = areaFromMm(d2);
    const Aann = Math.max(A2 - A1, 0);
    const Q1 = A1 * v1;
    const Q2 = Aann * v2;
    const Q3 = Q1 + Q2;
    const v3 = A2 > 0 ? Q3 / A2 : 0;
    const jetShare = Q3 > 0 ? Q1 / Q3 : 0;
    const annShare = Q3 > 0 ? Q2 / Q3 : 0;
    const areaShare = A2 > 0 ? A1 / A2 : 0;

    return { v1, v2, d1, d2, A1, A2, Aann, Q1, Q2, Q3, v3, jetShare, annShare, areaShare };
  }

  function syncText(data) {
    labels.v1.textContent = fmt(data.v1, 1) + ' m/s';
    labels.v2.textContent = fmt(data.v2, 1) + ' m/s';
    labels.d1.textContent = fmt(data.d1, 0) + ' mm';
    labels.d2.textContent = fmt(data.d2, 0) + ' mm';

    out.A1.textContent = fmt(data.A1, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.Aann.textContent = fmt(data.Aann, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.A2.textContent = fmt(data.A2, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.Q1.textContent = fmt(data.Q1, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.Q2.textContent = fmt(data.Q2, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.v3.textContent = fmt(data.v3, 2) + ' m/s';

    out.ovQ1.textContent = fmt(data.Q1, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovQ2.textContent = fmt(data.Q2, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovQ3.textContent = fmt(data.Q3, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.ovV3.textContent = fmt(data.v3, 2) + ' m/s';

    out.jetBar.style.width = (data.jetShare * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.annBar.style.width = (data.annShare * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    out.jetLabel.textContent = (data.jetShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
    out.annLabel.textContent = (data.annShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

    out.eq1.textContent = 'A_1 = ' + fmt(data.A1, 4) + ' m^2, A_ann = ' + fmt(data.Aann, 4) + ' m^2, A_2 = ' + fmt(data.A2, 4) + ' m^2';
    out.eq2.textContent = 'V̇_3 = ' + fmt(data.Q1, 4) + ' + ' + fmt(data.Q2, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(data.Q3, 4) + ' m^3/s';
    out.eq3.textContent = 'v_3 = ' + fmt(data.Q3, 4) + ' / ' + fmt(data.A2, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(data.v3, 2) + ' m/s';

    if (data.jetShare > 0.65) {
      out.expl.textContent = 'Središnji mlaz sada nosi većinu ukupnog protoka, pa on najviše određuje izlaz. Ipak, jer se taj tok na kraju raspodijeli na cijeli presjek A2, izlazna brzina ' + fmt(data.v3, 2) + ' m/s ostaje osjetno manja od ulazne brzine mlaza ' + fmt(data.v1, 1) + ' m/s.';
    } else if (data.annShare > 0.65) {
      out.expl.textContent = 'Prstenasti tok sada puni većinu ukupnog izlaza, pa se uniformna brzina snažno približava sporijem vanjskom toku. Brzi centar i dalje doprinosi, ali nema dovoljno udjela da sam povuče cijeli izlaz prema v1.';
    } else {
      out.expl.textContent = 'Oba ulaza sada daju usporedive volumenske doprinose. Zato je v3 kompromis između brzog centra i sporijeg prstena: dovoljno velik da osjeti mlaz, ali i dalje mnogo niži od v1 jer se tok širi na veći presjek A2.';
    }
  }

  function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
    const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
    const head = 10;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = width;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
    ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
    if (label) {
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
      ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 10);
    }
  }

  function drawScene(data) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
    bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
    bg.addColorStop(1, '#eaf5ff');
    ctx.fillStyle = bg;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const centerY = 286;
    const outerH = 122 + (data.d2 - 150) * 0.26;
    const innerH = Math.max(22, outerH * (data.d1 / data.d2));
    const inletX = 54;
    const mixStart = 248;
    const mixEnd = 466;
    const outX = 658;
    const pipeY = centerY - outerH / 2;
    const pipeH = outerH;
    const innerY = centerY - innerH / 2;
    const annulusGap = Math.max(16, (outerH - innerH) / 2 - 10);
    const mixedColor = mixColor(data.jetShare);

    ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
    ctx.fillRect(26, 418, canvas.width - 52, 10);

    roundedRect(inletX, pipeY, outX - inletX, pipeH, 34);
    const shellGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(inletX, 0, outX, 0);
    shellGrad.addColorStop(0, '#f8fbff');
    shellGrad.addColorStop(1, '#e3eef8');
    ctx.fillStyle = shellGrad;
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#4a6f90';
    ctx.lineWidth = 4;
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(143,231,255,.35)';
    roundedRect(inletX + 14, pipeY + 10, mixStart - inletX - 28, pipeH - 20, 28);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(47,128,237,.88)';
    roundedRect(inletX + 18, innerY, mixStart - inletX - 36, innerH, innerH / 2);
    ctx.fill();

    const mixGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(mixStart, 0, mixEnd, 0);
    mixGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(47,128,237,.86)');
    mixGrad.addColorStop(.45, 'rgba(70,166,239,.72)');
    mixGrad.addColorStop(1, mixedColor.replace('rgb', 'rgba').replace(')', ',0.75)'));
    ctx.fillStyle = mixGrad;
    roundedRect(mixStart, pipeY + 12, mixEnd - mixStart, pipeH - 24, 26);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.fillStyle = mixedColor.replace('rgb', 'rgba').replace(')', ',0.82)');
    roundedRect(mixEnd - 2, pipeY + 12, outX - mixEnd - 12, pipeH - 24, 26);
    ctx.fill();

    for (let i = 0; i < 24; i++) {
      const ratio = ((i / 24) + phase * (0.011 + data.v1 / 260)) % 1;
      const x = inletX + 26 + ratio * (mixStart - inletX - 58);
      const y = centerY + ((i % 5) - 2) * (innerH / 5.4);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.88)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 3.1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < 18; i++) {
      const ratio = ((i / 18) + phase * (0.004 + data.v2 / 220)) % 1;
      const x = inletX + 26 + ratio * (mixStart - inletX - 58);
      const yTop = centerY - innerH / 2 - 7 - (i % 3) * (annulusGap / 2.3);
      const yBot = centerY + innerH / 2 + 7 + (i % 3) * (annulusGap / 2.3);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.82)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, yTop, 2.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.arc(x, yBot, 2.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
      const angle = phase * 0.08 + i * 0.45;
      const orbit = (0.35 + (i % 5) / 6) * outerH * 0.24;
      const x = mixStart + 24 + ((i * 19 + phase * (5 + data.jetShare * 6)) % (mixEnd - mixStart - 48));
      const y = centerY + Math.sin(angle) * orbit;
      ctx.fillStyle = i % 2 === 0 ? 'rgba(47,128,237,.42)' : 'rgba(86,204,242,.42)';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < 28; i++) {
      const ratio = ((i / 28) + phase * (0.006 + data.v3 / 240)) % 1;
      const x = mixEnd + 16 + ratio * (outX - mixEnd - 36);
      const y = centerY + ((i % 6) - 2.5) * (outerH / 6.5);
      ctx.fillStyle = mixedColor.replace('rgb', 'rgba').replace(')', ',0.86)');
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }

    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(74,111,144,.18)';
    ctx.setLineDash([8, 8]);
    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
      const y = pipeY + 24 + i * ((pipeH - 48) / 3);
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(mixStart + 14, y);
      ctx.lineTo(mixEnd - 14, y + ((i % 2 === 0 ? 1 : -1) * 10));
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    ctx.setLineDash([]);

    const insetOuter = 28;
    const insetInner = insetOuter * (data.d1 / data.d2);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(143,231,255,.18)';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(140, 88, insetOuter, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#8aa7bf';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(47,128,237,.84)';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(140, 88, insetInner, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = mixedColor;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(242, 88, insetOuter, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = mixedColor.replace('rgb', 'rgba').replace(')', ',0.24)');
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(242, 88, insetOuter, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.fillStyle = '#355771';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('Presjek 1', 106, 130);
    ctx.fillText('Presjek 3', 208, 130);

    drawArrow(74, centerY, 74 + Math.min(98, 30 + data.v1 * 2.2), centerY, '#1d4ed8', 5, 'v1');
    drawArrow(74, centerY - innerH / 2 - annulusGap * 0.6, 74 + Math.min(84, 26 + data.v2 * 5.4), centerY - innerH / 2 - annulusGap * 0.6, '#0891b2', 3.6, 'v2');
    drawArrow(mixEnd + 18, centerY, mixEnd + 18 + Math.min(92, 32 + data.v3 * 7), centerY, mixedColor, 5, 'v3');

    ctx.fillStyle = '#163c61';
    ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
    ctx.fillText('brzi središnji mlaz', 86, pipeY - 16);
    ctx.fillText('zona miješanja', mixStart + 42, pipeY - 16);
    ctx.fillText('uniformni izlaz', mixEnd + 56, pipeY - 16);
  }

  function update() {
    latest = compute();
    syncText(latest);
  }

  function loop() {
    phase += 1;
    if (latest) drawScene(latest);
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
    input.addEventListener('input', update);
  });

  root.querySelector('#cx75b-preset-base').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = 26;
    inputs.v2.value = 2.6;
    inputs.d1.value = 100;
    inputs.d2.value = 300;
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#cx75b-preset-jet').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = 35;
    inputs.v2.value = 2.0;
    inputs.d1.value = 90;
    inputs.d2.value = 300;
    update();
  });
  root.querySelector('#cx75b-preset-ann').addEventListener('click', function() {
    inputs.v1.value = 20;
    inputs.v2.value = 5.5;
    inputs.d1.value = 80;
    inputs.d2.value = 360;
    update();
  });

  update();
  loop();
})();
</script>
```

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<style>
  .mf1-ux-intro{display:grid;gap:.85rem;padding:1rem 1.15rem;margin:0 1rem 1rem;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.92),rgba(247,250,252,.92));border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.22);box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.06)}
  .mf1-ux-intro-title{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start}
  .mf1-ux-intro-title strong{font-size:.95rem;color:#16324d}
  .mf1-ux-intro-title span{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#5b7289;background:rgba(255,255,255,.8);padding:.28rem .55rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.18)}
  .mf1-ux-intro p{margin:0;font-size:.89rem;line-height:1.6;color:#526b83}
  .mf1-ux-buttons{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.55rem}
  .mf1-ux-btn{appearance:none;border:none;border-radius:999px;padding:.55rem .9rem;font:inherit;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease,background .18s ease,color .18s ease}
  .mf1-ux-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(15,23,42,.08)}
  .mf1-ux-btn-primary{background:#123a63;color:#fff}
  .mf1-ux-btn-secondary{background:#eef4f9;color:#244767;border:1px solid rgba(36,71,103,.12)}
  .mf1-ux-summary{padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,118,110,.08),rgba(14,165,233,.08));border:1px solid rgba(14,116,144,.14);color:#16324d}
  .mf1-ux-summary strong{display:block;margin-bottom:.28rem;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#1f5f76}
  .mf1-ux-summary p{margin:0;font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.55}
  .mf1-ux-range-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-top:.3rem;font-size:.72rem;color:#7a8ea3}
  .mf1-ux-range-meta span{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.25rem}
  @media (max-width:640px){
    .mf1-ux-intro-title{flex-direction:column}
    .mf1-ux-buttons{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .mf1-ux-btn{justify-content:center;text-align:center}
  }
</style>
<script>
(function() {
  function enhanceWidget(config) {
    const root = document.getElementById(config.rootId);
    if (!root || root.dataset.mf1UxReady === '1') return;
    const hero = root.querySelector('.hero') || root.firstElementChild;
    const controls = root.querySelector('.controls');
    if (!hero || !controls) return;
    root.dataset.mf1UxReady = '1';

    const intro = document.createElement('div');
    intro.className = 'mf1-ux-intro';
    intro.innerHTML =
      '<div class="mf1-ux-intro-title"><strong>' + config.title + '</strong><span>Brzi scenariji</span></div>' +
      '<p>' + config.tip + '</p>' +
      '<div class="mf1-ux-buttons"></div>';
    hero.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', intro);

    const buttons = intro.querySelector('.mf1-ux-buttons');
    config.presets.forEach(function(preset) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.type = 'button';
      btn.className = 'mf1-ux-btn ' + (preset.kind === 'secondary' ? 'mf1-ux-btn-secondary' : 'mf1-ux-btn-primary');
      btn.textContent = preset.label;
      btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        Object.entries(preset.values).forEach(function(entry) {
          const input = root.querySelector('#' + entry[0]);
          if (!input) return;
          input.value = entry[1];
          input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        });
      });
      buttons.appendChild(btn);
    });

    const summary = document.createElement('div');
    summary.className = 'mf1-ux-summary';
    summary.innerHTML = '<strong>Što se sada događa</strong><p>Pomakni neki klizač za sažetak promjene.</p>';
    controls.insertBefore(summary, controls.firstElementChild.nextElementSibling || controls.firstElementChild);

    controls.querySelectorAll('input[type="range"]').forEach(function(input) {
      const row = input.closest('.row') || input.parentElement;
      if (!row || row.querySelector('.mf1-ux-range-meta')) return;
      const meta = document.createElement('div');
      meta.className = 'mf1-ux-range-meta';
      meta.innerHTML = '<span>min ' + input.min + '</span><span>max ' + input.max + '</span>';
      row.appendChild(meta);
    });

    const updateSummary = function() {
      summary.querySelector('p').textContent = config.summary(root);
    };

    controls.querySelectorAll('input[type="range"]').forEach(function(input) {
      input.addEventListener('input', updateSummary);
      input.addEventListener('change', updateSummary);
    });

    updateSummary();
    setTimeout(updateSummary, 150);
  }

  const configs = [
    {
      rootId: 'diffuser-widget-70-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 70',
      tip: 'Kreni od zadanog slučaja, zatim promijeni promjere. Najbrže se uči kad pratiš kako veći izlazni presjek odmah spušta izlaznu brzinu i mijenja omjer površina.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'd1-70p': 120, 'd2-70p': 180, 'v2-70p': 16, 'rho-70p': 998 } },
        { label: 'Širi difuzor', values: { 'd1-70p': 95, 'd2-70p': 230, 'v2-70p': 14, 'rho-70p': 998 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Skoro bez širenja', values: { 'd1-70p': 130, 'd2-70p': 145, 'v2-70p': 20, 'rho-70p': 998 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const d1 = root.querySelector('#d1-70p-label')?.textContent || '';
        const d2 = root.querySelector('#d2-70p-label')?.textContent || '';
        const v1 = root.querySelector('#v1-res-70p')?.textContent || '';
        const q = root.querySelector('#vdot-res-70p')?.textContent || '';
        return 'Za D1 = ' + d1 + ' i D2 = ' + d2 + ', potrebna ulazna brzina je ' + v1 + ', dok je protok ' + q + '. Usporedi D1 i D2: što je difuzor širi, to je razlika brzina izraženija.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'mixing-widget-71-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 71',
      tip: 'Prvo mijenjaj protoke A i B, pa tek onda promjer izlaza. Tako se najjasnije vidi razlika između bilance mase i geometrijskog utjecaja presjeka C.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'qa-71p': 150, 'qb-71p': 30, 'dc-71p': 30, 'rhoa-71p': 1000, 'rhorel-71p': 0.8 } },
        { label: 'Više ulja', values: { 'qa-71p': 120, 'qb-71p': 60, 'dc-71p': 30, 'rhoa-71p': 1000, 'rhorel-71p': 0.87 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Širi izlaz', values: { 'qa-71p': 180, 'qb-71p': 30, 'dc-71p': 42, 'rhoa-71p': 1000, 'rhorel-71p': 0.8 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const vc = root.querySelector('#vc-71p')?.textContent || '';
        const rhoc = root.querySelector('#rhoc-71p')?.textContent || '';
        const mc = root.querySelector('#mc-71p')?.textContent || '';
        return 'Mješavina na izlazu trenutno ima brzinu ' + vc + ', gustoću ' + rhoc + ' i ukupni maseni tok ' + mc + '. Ako povećaš protok ulja, izlaz postaje gušći; ako povećaš D_C, brzina pada.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'tank-widget-72-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 72',
      tip: 'Najprije usporedi ulaznu brzinu v1 s izlazima v2 i v3. To je najintuitivniji put do razumijevanja znaka dh/dt i smjera toka zraka kroz odzračnik.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'tank72-v1': 8.3, 'tank72-v2': 0.9, 'tank72-v3': 3.6, 'tank72-ds': 0.61, 'tank72-d1': 75, 'tank72-d2': 50, 'tank72-d3': 60, 'tank72-d4': 50 } },
        { label: 'Brzo punjenje', values: { 'tank72-v1': 12, 'tank72-v2': 0.6, 'tank72-v3': 2.5, 'tank72-ds': 0.55, 'tank72-d1': 90, 'tank72-d2': 45, 'tank72-d3': 55, 'tank72-d4': 50 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Pražnjenje', values: { 'tank72-v1': 3.0, 'tank72-v2': 2.5, 'tank72-v3': 6.5, 'tank72-ds': 0.50, 'tank72-d1': 60, 'tank72-d2': 70, 'tank72-d3': 90, 'tank72-d4': 50 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const status = root.querySelector('#tank72-status')?.textContent || '';
        const dhdt = root.querySelector('#tank72-dhdt')?.textContent || '';
        const v4 = root.querySelector('#tank72-v4')?.textContent || '';
        return status + '. Razina se mijenja brzinom ' + dhdt + ', a zrak u cijevi 4 ima brzinu ' + v4 + '.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'tank-widget-73-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 73',
      tip: 'Ovdje prvo prati razliku između volumena vode i benzina, a tek onda brzinu zraka. Smjer zraka je posljedica volumenske bilance slojevitog spremnika.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'tank73-m1': 10.2, 'tank73-m2': 5.3, 'tank73-rb': 0.69, 'tank73-rz': 1.2, 'tank73-d3': 50 } },
        { label: 'Istisak zraka', values: { 'tank73-m1': 14, 'tank73-m2': 4, 'tank73-rb': 0.67, 'tank73-rz': 1.2, 'tank73-d3': 50 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Usis zraka', values: { 'tank73-m1': 6, 'tank73-m2': 8, 'tank73-rb': 0.75, 'tank73-rz': 1.2, 'tank73-d3': 50 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const status = root.querySelector('#tank73-status')?.textContent || '';
        const v3 = root.querySelector('#tank73-v3air')?.textContent || '';
        const rhoB = root.querySelector('#tank73-rho-b')?.textContent || '';
        return status + '. Zrak u cijevi 3 trenutno ima brzinu ' + v3 + ', a gustoća benzina je ' + rhoB + '.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'wind-tunnel-74-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 74',
      tip: 'Najbolje je odvojeno testirati jačinu pojedine perforacije i ukupan broj provrta. Tako se brzo vidi kako lokalni odsis određuje globalni pad protoka u glavnom kanalu.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'wt74-v1': 46, 'wt74-vp': 10, 'wt74-np': 800, 'wt74-dp': 7, 'wt74-l': 4, 'wt74-d1': 0.9, 'wt74-df': 2.4 } },
        { label: 'Jak odsis', values: { 'wt74-v1': 46, 'wt74-vp': 16, 'wt74-np': 1000, 'wt74-dp': 9, 'wt74-l': 5, 'wt74-d1': 0.9, 'wt74-df': 2.4 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Slab odsis', values: { 'wt74-v1': 46, 'wt74-vp': 6, 'wt74-np': 500, 'wt74-dp': 5, 'wt74-l': 3, 'wt74-d1': 0.9, 'wt74-df': 2.4 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const vs = root.querySelector('#wt74-Vs')?.textContent || '';
        const v2 = root.querySelector('#wt74-v2')?.textContent || '';
        const vf = root.querySelector('#wt74-vf')?.textContent || '';
        return 'Ukupni odsis je ' + vs + ', pa brzina u presjeku 2 pada na ' + v2 + ', a potrebna brzina ventilatora postaje ' + vf + '.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'coaxial-widget-75-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 75',
      tip: 'Najlakše je pratiti omjer D1/D2 i razliku v1 prema v2. Tada odmah postaje jasno zašto konačna brzina v3 obično nije blizu brzom središnjem mlazu nego ukupnoj bilanci presjeka.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'cx75-v1': 26, 'cx75-v2': 2.6, 'cx75-d1': 100, 'cx75-d2': 300 } },
        { label: 'Dominantan mlaz', values: { 'cx75-v1': 34, 'cx75-v2': 2.0, 'cx75-d1': 120, 'cx75-d2': 260 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Široki prsten', values: { 'cx75-v1': 22, 'cx75-v2': 4.0, 'cx75-d1': 80, 'cx75-d2': 360 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const v3 = root.querySelector('#cx75-v3')?.textContent || '';
        const ratio = root.querySelector('#cx75-ratio')?.textContent || '';
        return 'Nakon miješanja izlazna uniformna brzina je ' + v3 + ', dok središnji mlaz zauzima omjer A1/A2 = ' + ratio + '. Taj omjer snažno određuje koliko će brzi mlaz “povući” cijeli izlaz.';
      }
    }
  ];

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { configs.forEach(enhanceWidget); });
  } else {
    configs.forEach(enhanceWidget);
  }
})();
</script>
```
